info.description: CheesyInnaWoodFixes ports CDDA innawoods content and makes industrial age possible.
info.name: CheesyInnaWoodFixes

data.description: An alloy of 70% copper and 30% zinc, useful for creating bullet casings.
A liquid precursor to rubber found in some plants.
Common in nature as an insect venom, this substance has a number of industrial uses such as preservation and manufacturing.
A small roll of birchbark with cord, to tie around wounds to help stop bleeding and protect from dirt.  It's better than nothing.
Birchbark bandages with added garlic salve.  They're better for wounds but not as good as real bandages.
A bundle of cables around an iron core.  Useful for controlling voltage.
This is the outer casing of a light battery.  It will need to be refilled to be useful.
This is the outer casing of a medium battery.  It will need to be refilled to be useful.
This is the outer casing of a heavy battery.  It will need to be refilled to be useful.

data.//: No longer needed since alternative insulation options got mainlined.
Realistically this would be limited by how many times it's been struck, but would be a hassle to track variations on casings based on how many times it's been re-used.

This is the old, completely inaccurate and frankly just terrible recipe from the mainline. It was ported to Innawoods for the sake of not removing the ability to learn electronics for players but it should ideally be changed/replaced.

another variation of chloralkali process, now used to produce bleach (sodium hypochlorite - or rather rough, technical grade hypochlorite/hydroxide/chloride mix), note we will not be heating anything and that the (mostly) electrochemical reaction easily scales in size, some hydrogen gas could be recoverable (optional byproduct)

abstracting using chloralkali process (hot solution, unpartitioned cell) to produce sodium chlorate, then perchlorate by anodic oxidation on platinum, then ammonia perchlorate by double decomposition from sodium perchlorate and ammonium chloride; while we can't directly use bleach here but we do end up recovering some brine

info.description: Adds dinosaurs. Some rideable, others less friendly. Life will find a way.
info.name: DinoMod

data.dynamic_line: You ask me what I can see, but I don't tell you what you see.  Sometimes we have shields up, to protect ourselves.

responses.text: Yes.  I ask because I noticed there are dinosaurs around.  Do you know anything about that?

data.dynamic_line: I know all kinds of weird useless stuff.  I've seen things at churches, I've seen things on farms, I've seen whole exhibits way out.  Those Swampers, they know what's happening.  They're creatures of light come back to save us all.  Or eat us, I forget.  Oh and that Old Guard Repo Man hates them and Red at the train station.

responses.text: Why are you sitting out here?
I think I have to get going…
What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: I am afraid that is drifting far out of my area of expertise, but I would be willing to bet some of the little ones might be worth something to you if you tamed them and raised them.  No fur to speak of, but feathers might be of some use, and meat and eggs could help.  I'm not sure what they eat, but I hope it isn't rabbits or people on the more rabbit adjacent end of things.

responses.text: Maybe dinosaurs and rabbits aren't so different.

data.job_description: The great eaters have returned and they must be fed

data.//: A charismatic religious leader and CEO.

dynamic_line.no: You look hungry friend.  So much hunger in this world.  This is the time of the eaters.

responses.text: You mentioned some pretenders before.  What does that mean?
Would you like to join me on my travels?
Is there a way I can help feed the eaters?
I have to get going.  Take care, CEO Baronyx.

data.dynamic_line: The great eaters have returned, along with the false ones.  We must feed the eaters and destroy the pretenders child.

responses.text: No thank you, I'd like to leave now.

data.dynamic_line: This Cataclysm has woken the great eaters, lost in time, returned them to the world to do their great work, to multiply and fill the land with their song.  The time of man is over, but we few who remain can do our part to protect this new world from the pretenders, who would steal the meat.

responses.text: So what do you do with the meat?
Who are the great eaters and the pretenders?

data.dynamic_line: The great eaters are the ones that were lost, what we call dinosaurs whose meat we took and who are taking it back.  The pretenders are those others that have come to steal the meat of this world.  It does not belong to them and we will take it from their mouths.

responses.text: Okay, so you worship dinosaurs.  Understood.

data.dynamic_line: The Swampers knew these times would return and we prepared for them.  When others wasted their time and meat, we fed and grew strong, and we filled our stores with meat for this day.

responses.text: You keep talking about meat.  Why is meat so important?

data.dynamic_line: The meat makes the great eaters strong.  We gather the meat and feed them, and in the end we too will serve the eaters in death as we do in life.  This was always our purpose and we lucky few have lived to see it.

responses.text: Our purpose?  How do you know?

data.dynamic_line: The return of the great eaters was fortold by a prophet.  We faithful have been waiting and preparing since the revelation.

responses.text: I guess it must be nice to be proven right.

data.dynamic_line: You understand our purpose.  I welcome you to this work, all are needed to feed the eaters.
You deny what you see right in front of you.  This world is what was fortold.

description.str: Gather meat for Bo Baronyx.  About 8 should do it.

dialogue.accepted: Excellent.  The eaters must feed.
dialogue.advice: Some of the animals have become touched by the pretenders in recent days, larger and more dangerous, producing tainted mutant meat.  This will not work for the great eaters, it must be the true meat.
dialogue.describe: The eaters are hungry.  They need meat
dialogue.failure: I see no meat.  There is meat in the forests and swamps waiting for the eaters.
dialogue.offer: If you wish to feed the eaters, your work will be rewarded.  Go out, butcher a pure animal.  Not a false eater, the meat must be good to eat.  Then bring me the meat and I will see to the eaters.
dialogue.rejected: Understood.  The great eaters will feed either way.
dialogue.success: The eaters will feed.  Oh, this one seems to like you.
dialogue.success_lie: The eaters will feed I am sure.

has_no_available_mission.has_no_assigned_mission: The eaters have fed.  They will be hungry again in time

has_many_available_missions.has_no_assigned_mission: The great eaters must be fed.  Are you ready?

no.has_many_assigned_missions: There is still more work to do.  Are you ready?
no.no: There is meat ready for the feeding.  Are you ready to gather it?
I know of eaters ready for meat.

data.dynamic_line: If you are ready to be of service to the great eaters, go and find meat and bring it back.  There is always need for more.

responses.text: Happy to be of service to the great eaters.  I'm in.

data.dynamic_line: Excellent.  Make it happen.

responses.text: Consider it done.  But I also wanted to ask…
Can you share some equipment to aid me in this?

data.dynamic_line: The great eaters are not picky, any pure meat will do, but mutant and tainted meat are not good enough.

responses.text: So, meat from a creature that isn't a zombie, or a giant monster.  Got it.

data.dynamic_line: Of course, you should find everything you need here.

dynamic_line.no: No, I must remain here to oversee the company.
dynamic_line.yes: Oh, you know my friend Brigitte.  Well in that case, let's go!

responses.text: Not just now.  You should remain here to oversee the company.

data.dynamic_line: Of course, the company will be ready when you are and the great eaters will feed either way.

responses.text: Maybe some other time.  Changing the topic…
Alright, but I have to go now.

data.dynamic_line: It was fortold that as the great eaters returned, so too would the pretenders, who would come to steal the meat.  Very little is asked of us, except that we do all we can to ensure that the true great eaters received as much meat as possible and the pretenders go hungry.

responses.text: Yes CEO Baronyx, very good CEO Baronyx.
This makes no sense and I'm done talking about it.

data.description: A prosperous but secretive group of churchgoers and entertainment moguls with an affection for dinosaurs.  They welcome all untainted humans.
data.name: Swampers Religious Community and Hotels and Casinos

dynamic_line.no: You there, wanderer.  You have the look of someone who hates dinosaurs.  Are you ready to take this country back?

yes.no: You're back.  I knew you were a killer.  Are you ready to take this country back?
yes.yes: It's a good day to shoot some dinos.

responses.text: Dinosaurs?  What are you talking about?

data.dynamic_line: They just started showing up about the same time it all fell apart.  They attack the caravans and the bandits both.  Hungry bastards.  All dinosaurs are shoot on sight.  We don't eat them, they're probably poisoned with whatever got the dead ones.  Just leave them for the crows.  Same with the eggs.

data.description: We lost another trade caravan.  Whatever did the damage is still out there.  Investigate the trade route and eliminate the threat.

dialogue.accepted: Thanks, keeping the people safe is what we try and do.
dialogue.advice: Search the bushes for any trace?  I'm not an expert tracker but you should be able to find something.
dialogue.describe: We need help…
dialogue.failure: It was a lost cause anyways…
dialogue.offer: It sounds like you get it.  There is something out there scaring the merchants.  They got away safe but lost a grain shipment, you're welcome to it if you can haul it back.  Check out the area and report anything you find.
dialogue.rejected: Come back when you get a chance, we really need to start reclaiming the region.
dialogue.success: Great work, wasn't sure what I was sending you after.
dialogue.success_lie: What good does this do us?

data.description: We lost a scout searching the woods for a lost family.  Find the scout or take out what got them.

dialogue.accepted: Thanks, keeping the people safe is what we try and do.
dialogue.advice: Try not to make too much noise.  Visibility is bad in the woods so it's all about sound.
dialogue.describe: We need help…
dialogue.failure: It was a lost cause anyways…
dialogue.offer: Seems like the only news we get here is bad.  A weirdo family was staying outside the center, I don't know why.  They said something about germs.  Anyway, they're gone, vanished in the night.  We sent a scout out to find them but now they're gone too.  We have a pretty good idea of where in the woods the scout was searching.  Bring back anyone you can alive and end whatever is keeping them.
dialogue.rejected: Come back when you get a chance, we really need to start reclaiming the region.
dialogue.success: Great work, wasn't sure what I was sending you after.
dialogue.success_lie: What good does this do us?

data.description: Someone or something in the swamps is stealing cattle.  Stop it.

dialogue.accepted: Thanks, keeping the people safe is what we try and do.
dialogue.advice: Maybe bring a rope to bring the cattle back or something for them to eat.  They can be ornery cusses if you don't know how to treat them.
dialogue.describe: We need help…
dialogue.failure: It was a lost cause anyways…
dialogue.offer: This is probably a waste of time, but a nearby farmer has been complaining that someone or something has been stealing a lot of their cattle.  We don't normally bother with little things like this, but our food supplies are getting low and the farmers are threatening to cut us off if we won't help.  I've marked on your map where the farmers think the cattle are going.
dialogue.rejected: Come back when you get a chance, we really need to start reclaiming the region.
dialogue.success: Oh.  Oh no.  We didn't think the dinosaurs could raise and we've killed so many of them.  We might be in trouble here.  Here's one now, I'll rip it apart!  Wait, I can see in its dead eyes that it loves us and wants to help us.  I'll just end up killing it, I'm barely holding it together here.  You'd better take it.
dialogue.success_lie: What good does this do us?

data.description: Kill 50 dinos

dialogue.accepted: Kill all dinos.
dialogue.advice: You can kill a lot of dinos without taking a lot of pills, but I don't see how.
dialogue.describe: We need help…
dialogue.failure: It was a lost cause anyways…
dialogue.offer: While we were out on a hunting party a couple of those big ugly ones came back and ate a whole mob of the dead I wanted to take out.  We lost a lot of soldiers too while we were out too, good ones, and they died bad.  Slow.  I made sure of it, the traitors.  These dinosaurs have gone too far.  They're making us crazy.  We need to rack up some serious numbers to catch up.  We need some serious risk taking, I'm talking explosives and fire and drugs and rock and roll here.  I don't care if it's living dinos or dead, they all need to be taken down.
dialogue.rejected: I'm right on the edge soldier.  Whose side are you on here?
dialogue.success: That's what I like to hear.  We got our numbers too, and we chained down a couple too.  I had to take out a few more soldiers who didn't make their numbers, so this is good.  We're doing good.
dialogue.success_lie: What good does this do us?

data.description: Kill me a T Rex

dialogue.accepted: MY LIFE FOR YOU.
dialogue.advice: You're a dino killing machine like me.  You know what to do.
dialogue.describe: We need help…
dialogue.failure: It was a lost cause anyways…
dialogue.offer: I have a special mission I need to complete before these dinos finish killing me off, and I need you to bring me a something special.  Go kill me a T Rex.  We're going to be gods.  It's all going to be worth it.
dialogue.rejected: I'm right on the edge soldier.  Whose side are you on here?
dialogue.success: All right, we've got the body here.  Watch this, I'm going to climb into its dead mouth and when you see me again I'll be a god.  *SWALLOW*
dialogue.success_lie: What good does this do us?

data.job_description: Need to learn what happened…
data.name: DinoLab survivor

dynamic_line.no: Please leave me be, I am but a humble muck farmer in this humble muck.
yes: How can I help you survivor?
Seen any interesting specimens?  I mean dinosaurs.
I was just imagining you transforming into a tyrannosaurus rex.  Of course that's impossible.  Unless…

responses.text: You are dressed like a scientist.  Are you a scientist?  You look like a dinosaur.  Are you a dinosaur?  Are you a scientist dinosaur?
You look like you need help.  Can I do something for you?

data.dynamic_line: You have seen through my ruse.  In retrospect I should have prepared a costume of some kind.  Unimportant!  You haven't attacked me or tried to seduce me so you aren't like the others.  Had any bad headaches recently, strange mood swings, strong urges, desire for human flesh?

responses.text: Only the usual.  What are you really?
You are aware of the Cataclysm then?
I'd rather not say at this point.

data.dynamic_line: I am a hard working professional in a challenging field adjusting to a recent change in circumstances.  That is all you need to know.

My manager Dr. Tingle made some important mistakes and I have had to make some quick decisions I would rather not go into detail on.  In retrospect our faculties may have been influenced by external factors.  Suffice to say Dr. Tingle is no longer with us but died happy.  And I escaped alive.
Look at me.  Yes, I am aware.  The question is what happens next.

responses.text: Yes.  Let's talk about something else.

data.dynamic_line: I just got here actually, I've found it wise to move a lot recently.  There may be some interesting specimens nearby.  I mean dinosaurs.

dialogue.accepted: So much to do.
dialogue.advice: It might be too dangerous now, any working full chemistry set is fine.  There is a good chance something got out.
dialogue.describe: I think I might know where a decent chemistry set is…
dialogue.failure: It's fine, I'll make something work.
dialogue.inquire: Do you have the set yet?
dialogue.offer: I need a full chemistry set to do my work properly.  I could use some help.
dialogue.rejected: Fine, you'll probably be dead soon anyway.
dialogue.success: Let's get started.
dialogue.success_lie: Very convincing.  I do need an actual chemistry set to work though.

dialogue.accepted: So much to do.
dialogue.advice: Kiernan is probably still at the old field office.  It should be fine as long as the emergency power is still working.  You may have to do some kind of stupid task before Kiernan talks.  Try not to get violent.  If Kiernan is dead try and find some notes or books.
dialogue.describe: I need some expert advice…
dialogue.failure: It's fine, I'll make something work.
dialogue.inquire: Do you have the information yet?
dialogue.offer: I don't have access to standard lab procedures here.  Find Dr. Kiernan and get some notes on the basics.  I can work from there.
dialogue.rejected: Ugh.
dialogue.success: Let's get started.  Oh, I'll make you a copy just in case.
dialogue.success_lie: Very convincing.  I do need the information to work though.

responses.text: What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: Their song is older than ours, but also different.  We have much to learn from their old bones.  I knew a man once who sang not of bones but of meat.  If you find him, you will know the face of Bo.  He has listened hardest to them, but I do not know if he hears.

responses.text: What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: They just started showing up about the same time it all fell apart.  They attack the caravans and the bandits both.  Hungry bastards.  All dinosaurs are shoot on sight.  We don't eat them, they're probably poisoned with whatever got the dead ones.  Just leave them for the crows.  Same with the eggs.  We have a forward base at the train station working on wiping them all out.  Talk to Red there.

responses.text: Strange greeting, ignoring that.  What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: Cute things aren't they!  Like big birds with big appetites.  The plant eaters are okay unless they get spooked.  Then it's time to hide on the roof for a while until they calm down.  I gave one some cattle feed and they seemed to like it fine, let me pet it and followed me around some. I bet you could tame them if they're young, maybe even some of the grown ones. A man came out here a while ago saying they were coming, that it was their time and we needed to get with them or get out of the way.  The man said I should follow him to the Swamper church, but I'm too busy here.  A whole lot of people went with him though.

responses.text: I'm sure they're fine.  What was that question again?
What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: That's a lot of meat to break down.  You're going to want to get together a real butcher setup, hooks and all, rig up a way to keep the meat cold or even better frozen, and figure out some way to make it last longer.  Could do jerky, maybe get a canning operation going.  The main thing is to work fast before it goes bad.  Hey, I know a pretty good cook who could help with that.  No, she's dead.  I'm here though.

text: Research on our visitors is proceeding nicely.  The raptor DNA is of special interest, with some novel protein chains that may lead to medical breakthroughs.

Research proceeds apace on our visitors.  While Operation Major Laser did not receive enough funding as hoped, our more humble bio-operator protocols were already prepared and are proceeding ahead of schedule.  The hosts are most receptive to improvement.
Dr. Yoshimi has been reprimanded for unauthorized contact with the procompsignathids.  Disgusting behavior, and a terrible example to the junior researchers.
Dr. Yoshimi has escaped, along with an unknown number of dinosaurs.  Unfortunately, we have bigger problems with XE037.
Strange sounds have been reported from the swamp nearby.  An enhanced security team was dispatched, but has not returned in 48 hours.  The facility is on lockdown.  We can’t let them get back in.

Tingle lab situation normal.  Dr. Tingle believes the Acrocanthosaurus is the best fit for hybridization and Tingle lab is working on safety protocols to provide the needed material to Dr. Tingle.  Velociraptor is another possibility given prior research.  Testing with chickens and the velociraptor specimens suggests some resistance.

Tingle lab situation critical.  Dr. Tingle violated safety protocols last night and attempted to secure genetic material directly, possibly under the influence of some drug or toxin, given the anatomical impossibility and danger of the procedure.  The Acrocanthosaurus specimen has escaped into the facility.

messages: You dream of a strange jungle with giant ferns.
Dreams of being the king are all you can remember.
You brush through tree sized ferns as you hunt for your prey.  The rain falls slick upon your skin.
Thunderous footsteps shake the earth, are they yours?
Your teeth, how do you have so many teeth?  Am I growing extra teeth?
The hairless apes around you smell like food.  Are they?
So close, you can taste the rebirth of a glorious past.
King, nay not a king.  A god among beasts.
The warm sun upon your skin.  A heavier air, golden dreams.
You dream of eating the largest fern you've ever seen.
Large, you are becoming larger every day.  Armored skin, to protect you from the world.  These are the gifts you are receiving.
You dream of before the Cataclysm, but you are different somehow.  The other humans all seem so soft to you.
Slower, trudging through the universe, you cease to notice those that try to stop you as you walk through them.
Why is this world so cold compared to the one in your dreams?
Is this how superman feels?  Bulletproof?  But superman is much faster than you.
Nothing less than an asteroid can kill you.

data.iv_message: You feel additional teeth working their way into your mouth.
data.mutagen_message: The gnashing of teeth and rending of flesh calls to you.
data.name: Tyrant

data.description: Thunder lizard, dragon, tyrant.  All these names pale before your majesty.

data.iv_message: Who needs platemail.
data.mutagen_message: You are the armor.
data.name: Stego

data.description: Slow, methodical, heavily armored.  A walking tank.
Your skin is getting tougher.  Cutting and bash armor are increased by 4 and stab armor by 1.  Makes you less dextrous though.
Your skin is developing kevlar-like qualities, granting you 6 physical armor, though not against bullets.  Makes you slower though.
You are capable of carrying inhuman amounts - more than others with similar strength could.  Your maximum weight carried is increased by 70%.

attacks.attack_text_npc: %1$s tears into %2$s with their serrated teeth
attacks.attack_text_u: You tear into %s with your serrated teeth

data.description: Your mouth has reshaped to accomodate many serrated teeth.  They make it impossible to wear mouthgear and difficult to eat… but tear giant wounds in your prey.
You have a long, thick, tail with sharp pointed horns.  It helps you balance a bit but also makes a heavy bludgeon.  Prevents wearing non-fabric pants.
The raggedly flying corpse  of a feathered reptile over three feet long, with short wings and a big colorful beak.
The flying corpse of a feathered reptile over three feet long, with short wings and a big colorful beak.  Its entire body bulges with distended muscles and swollen, festering wounds.
The raggedly flying corpse of a feathered reptile, with short wings and a colorful glowing beak.  It has been implanted with crackling bionics and is dripping black goo.

responses.text: What can you tell me about the dinosaurs?

data.dynamic_line: It could be a mighty challenge, but Alonso knows there are some that are into this, no?  I think they call themselves escalier, which is Italian for the scaly banana.  Or staircase.  It is not important, I mean to say that people love who they love, and the dinosaur, she does the same, and there is no shame in what two people or dinosaurs do in the escalier.  Alonso does not judge you.  You do you.  And maybe Alonso as well when you are done with the you doing.

data.description: You find yourself among trees.  The screaming and moaning is fainter, but it sounds like something bigger and more dangerous is close by.
data.name: Hunted by Dinosaurs

data.//: This graffiti is generally assumed to come from before the Cataclysm but post dino

text.text: Rejoice.  The great eaters have returned
There is a detailed drawing of a predator dinosaur with an arrow pointing at the mouth and the note 'INSERT HERE'.
<given_name> is dinosaur lunch
<given_name> + troodon
Dinos, zombies, it doesn't matter
Learn to fly!  Mess with a big dino!
T REX ET ME
I give up, I'm joining the dinosaurs
This is a cartoon rendition of a long necked four legged dinosaur.
This is a crudely spray painted tag adorned with dinosaur skulls.
KILL ALL DINOSAURS
Don't believe the government, the dinosaurs are real!

text: Good soldier.  Killed 40 dinos.
Bad soldier.  Killed 3 dinos.
Fed the great Eaters.  Will be honored for all time.
Meh scientist but a good friend.
Loved dinosaurs.  Should have run.
Died tragically rescuing his family from a burning tyrannosaurus.
Died wrestling a mosasaurus.  It was not just a big gator.
Built a beautiful farm and filled it with dangerous dinosaurs.
Life did not find a way.
The greatest dinosaur expert of our times.  Crushed to death by an apatosaurus.
Fool hid in a cardboard box from a deinonychus, shouting Dino Dave!  Didn't work.
Here lies a dinosaur, don't know what kind.  Hated shovels.
I've seen some big dinosaurs out there.  I know that should be scary, but all I felt was hungry.
I think those little dinosaurs are kind of cute, like a cat kind of.  Do you think they eat cat food?
Dinosaurs are a bow hunter's best friend.  Feathers forever!
I saw one of those feathered dinosaurs up close and it had these beautiful soft downy feathers under the big ones.  I bet if you could pluck one you could make a nice dino feather mattress.

Those big dinosaurs make a big mess.  If only there was some way to harness the power of those poops for the uplift of all mankind.  Maybe a renewable energy source, or a construction material, or super dino fertilizer
A buddy of mine wandered close to the swamps and was eaten by a T-Rex, a big lizard.  I'd be careful unless you have a gun and plenty of ammo.
I hear the zombies have been in the swamps.  Bad news if they bite a dinosaur before it bites them.
I know there aren't alligators in the sewer, but I heard there was some kind of big lizard down there.  Probably not a good idea to check.
Some of those big dinosaurs seem halfway all right.  I bet if you fed them something nice and gave them a pet you could ride them like a pony.  Or maybe they'd eat you instead.
I saw something with a large fin in the water.  It was the size of a whale and gave me a menacing feeling.  I'm gonna think twice before going back there.
One time I found a strange egg out in the woods.  It was probably a dinosaur, but I cooked it and it was pretty good!
One time I found a giant egg out in the woods.  I ate it raw all at once and then got sick all over.  Maybe I should have cooked it and eaten it bit by bit?

I got a bunch of these big lizards to follow me around and it was great and then they smashed up the place I was staying and then a bunch of other places I wanted to set up camp in.  Maybe I should have tied them down?

text.text: This is an advertisement for a local wildlife exhibit, claiming to have new and exciting animals on display.  Strangely, the only imagery on it is a stylized silhouette of a T. Rex.  The flier reads "Witness the rebirth of the extinct, grand opening this week!"
"SWAMPS BAD TEETH HUGE OHGOD"
"Why is that place just fucking crawling with lizards?"
"I bet dinosaurs can read and play chess so don't eat us because we can teach you important things like magnets and ramen"
"where's some .700 t-rex medicine when you need it?"
"So is this what happens when you stray off the path and step on a butterfly?"

"But even a much older gent  Sees itself forced to wander  He goes by the name Diplodocus  And belongs among the fossils  Mr. Carnegie packs him joyfully  Into giant arks  And sends him as gift  To several monarchs"
"What the hell is a brown and magenta 4 legged juvenile?!  Fucker took a dozen or more .308 rounds to put down.  Gives a ton of fucking meat"
"I saw the most beautiful dinosaur today.  I must dress her."
"I saw this one dinosaur and I was like gorge.  And then I saw this other dinosaur and I was like gooorge!  And then I saw this other one and I was like gorgosaurus!  Like for real."

"KILL ALL DINOSAURS.  DO NOT TAKE THEIR DRUGS.  DO NOT LISTEN TO THEIR LIES.  THEY ARE BEAUTIFUL AND WE WILL KILL THEM UNTIL WE DIE AND THEN WE WILL RISE AGAIN AND KILL THEM SOME MORE.  ANYONE WHO SAYS DIFFERENT IS THE ENEMY."

MANY MISSING: A wave of missing persons reports have shaken an already troubled nation, especially among members of the popular Swampers religion and hotel and casino chain.  Asked to comment, their charismatic CEO Bo Baronyx refused to explain their whereabouts, saying only 'The great eaters have returned and they will be sated' and winked and smiled in the most charming way.  The Swampers are doing their part in this crisis and are accepting donations of meat and money to feed the hungry.

CUTEST VISITORS: A mysterious portal of shimmering blue energy and flashing lights opened above Cretaceous Kindergarten today, showering children with the cutest tiny fuzzy dinosaurs and dinosaur babies.  Local paleontologist and exotic dancer Othniel Marsh expressed skepticism that dinosaurs had not died out millions of years ago but 'at this point why not, at least they're cute'.  And cute they are!

DENIES DINOSAURS: FEMA official Ernst Stromer said late last night that the cities are not safe and reports of dinosaurs outside the cities are wrong and 'possibly drug-related' but cautioned refugees to 'get all the guns you can' because 'it's bad out there'.

NEVER HUMANS?: Swamper scientists report that in every historical simulation they have run, humans never evolve, with dinosaurs remaining the dominant life form to present day in every model unless an artificial disaster event is introduced.  'Fear not, this world is healing, we will return to normal soon' reports Swamper CEO Bo Baronyx confidently.  Sounds like good news ahead!

GOD IS A DINOSAUR?:  Colorful FEMA official and slug mutant Ernst Stromer reported this morning that he has 'seen god and she is a hungry torvosaurus too beautiful for this world'.  He says that she 'cannot be harmed by bullets' and that she is 'made of beautiful golden light from above' and she demands human flesh.  Stromer says that every fighting man and woman must go to her to be destroyed by her 'atomic majesty'.  Good news America!

IMMERSION LOG: 30D-A

PRELIMINARY REPORT:

SUMMARY:
Exploration into sub-scape 30-D revealed biosphere similar to prime, similar to previous sub-scapes in same frequency.  Expedition team reported visual contact with several reptoids ('dinosaurs') and warm, humid conditions.  Though one reptoid made visual contact with the expedition team and approached, all members were returned with no incident.  Refer to previous sub-scape system 30 reports and meta-comparison report for further information.

info.description: A collection of fictional, mythologically inspired or otherwise unrealistic martial arts.

data.//: This group may be a bit overpopulated by MMA, but it seemed the most appropriate place for all of these
Sublime Way seem to be like books that rich people would be more likely to collect than the others, although still very rare
It seemed like something kids may have, despite technically being a martial art.

This book contains the teaching of the Diamond Mind discipline.

data.description: This encyclopedia contains a detailed listing of the strengths and techniques of various fictional monsters and how to apply them the in a real fight.
This book contains the teaching of the Setting Sun discipline.
This device contains the teachings of the first form of Jedi lightsaber combat: Shii-Cho.
This book contains the teaching of the Stone Dragon discipline.

Desert Wind maneuvers focus on quick movement and swirling, flaming strikes.  The complex spinning and slashing of the curved blade incorporated into many Desert Wind maneuvers are in fact carefully honed gestures that evoke the power of fire, if performed correctly and with the proper focus.
initiate: You feel a wave of heat wash over you as you assume a running combat stance.
%s assumes into a running combat stance.

ondodge_buffs.description:
You spin gracefully away from attacks, whirling like the dersert zephyr racing across the sands.

+1.0 Dodging skill, +1 Dodge attempt
Lasts 1 turn.
ondodge_buffs.name: Zephyr Dance

onmove_buffs.description:
A warm breeze swirls about you as you move speedily away.

+1.0 Dodging skill.
Lasts 1 turn.
onmove_buffs.name: Wind Stride

data.description: True quickness lies in the mind, not the body.  A student of the Diamond Mind discipline seeks to hone his perceptions and discipline his thoughts so that he can act in slivers of time so narrow that others cannot even perceive them.  A corollary of this speed of thought and action is the concept of the mind as the battleground.  An enemy defeated in his mind must inevitably be defeated in truth.
initiate: You concentrate and become very still for a moment.
%s becomes very still for a moment.

ondodge_buffs.description:
With every miss, your opponents become more uncertain, their doubt growing like an irritating pearl in the mouth of a helpless oyster.

+1 Dodge attempt
Lasts 1 turn.  Stacks 2 times
ondodge_buffs.name: Pearl of Black Doubt

ongethit_buffs.description:
Your training and mental toughness allow you to use your focus to overcome physical threats.

+1 Accuracy.
Lasts 1 turn.  Stacks 2 times
ongethit_buffs.name: Mind over Body

onpause_buffs.description:
In the blink of an eye, you make your move.  Your speed, reflexes, and boundless confidence combine to allow you to make a fast, bold move that catches your foes off guard.

+50 Speed.
Lasts 1 turn.
onpause_buffs.name: Quicksilver Motion

static_buffs.description:
You move slightly faster than normal due to a combination of confidence, raining, and clarity of mind.  This slight edge adds up with each action.

-15% move cost
static_buffs.name: Stance of Alacrity

data.description: This rare form of combat has been practiced by many legendary heroes throughout the ages.  Hylian Swordsmanship favors mobility for offense and defense by using spins, jumps, and flips to confuse enemies and strike from unexpected angles.
initiate: You begin to step lightly from side to side.
%s begins to step lightly from side to side.

ondodge_buffs.description:
When you perfectly dodge an attack, you can attack rapidly for a short time.

-25% move cost.
Lasts 1 turn.
ondodge_buffs.name: Flurry Rush

onmove_buffs.description:
Taking advantage of momentum, you rush towards foes to deliver a powerful strike.

+10% damage.
Lasts 1 turn.  Stacks 3 times.
onmove_buffs.name: Dash Attack

onpause_buffs.description:
By taking a moment to prepare, you can unleash a strong, spinning slash!

+20% damage, enables "Spin Attack" technique.
Lasts 1 turn.
onpause_buffs.name: Charge Up

static_buffs.description:
Always stay light on your feet.  It is better to evade than be hit.

+1.0 Dodging skill.
static_buffs.name: Combat Acrobat

static_buffs.description:
After a great deal of practice, you have become even more nimble in a battle.

+1.0 Dodging skill.
static_buffs.name: Intermediate Combat Acrobat

static_buffs.description:
You have seen so much combat that your dodging skills have become top notch!

+1.0 Dodging skill.
static_buffs.name: Master Combat Acrobat

data.description: Absolute mastery of the sword is the goal of the Iron Heart discipline.  Through unending practice and study, the Iron Heart adept achieves superhuman skill with her weapons.  Iron Heart maneuvers are demonstrations of uncanny martial skill—weaving patterns of steel that dizzy, confuse, and ultimately kill with no recourse.
initiate: You push away your fear and stand tall.
%s takes a bold and fearless stance.

data.description: Panzer Kunst or "Armor Art" is a futuristic martial art devised for cyborgs fighting in zero-gravity environments.
initiate: You adopt a panzer kunst stance.
%s adopts a panzer kunst stance.

ondodge_buffs.description:
"Armor Penetration"
By attuning to the rhythm of your opponent, you can strike where their guard is the weakest.
+5 bash Armor Penetration.
Lasts 2 turns.
ondodge_buffs.name: Einzug Rüstungen

static_buffs.description:
"Shadow Tracking"
As a künstler, you are trained to stay in your target's blind spot.

+1 Dodge attemps, Dodge Skill increased by 12%% of Perception.
static_buffs.name: Schatten Folgen

data.description: Pokken or "Pocket Fist" is a strange martial art developed from the famous Pokemon video game series.  Somehow, a group of dedicated fans managed to combine the moves used by various pokemon with multiple existing martial arts such as boxing and karate.  Amazingly, it actually works.  Some might even say it's a super effective way to fight.
initiate: You get ready to battle.
%s is about to challenge someone to a battle.

oncrit_buffs.description:
Powers up your techniques after you score a critical hit.

+50% damage.
Lasts 1 turn.
oncrit_buffs.name: Sniper

ongethit_buffs.description:
Boosts your defense after you get hit.

Gain bash, cut, stab armor equal to 50% of Strength.
Lasts 3 turns.
ongethit_buffs.name: Stamina

onkill_buffs.description:
Boosts your damage after defeating an opponent.

+50% damage.
Lasts 3 turns.
onkill_buffs.name: Moxie

data.description: The Setting Sun discipline teaches its initiates to turn their opponents' strength against them.  With a quick shift in stance and carefully aimed attack, a Setting Sun warrior sends a charging enemy tumbling in a new direction.
initiate: You shift your weight and prepare to defend yourself.
%s shifts their weight and assumes a new stance.

ongethit_buffs.description:
By intentionally openning your guard, you force your opponent to overextend and are able to take full advantage of your next attack!

+20 Speed.
Lasts 1 turn.
ongethit_buffs.name: Feigned Opening

onpause_buffs.description:
You intentionally move and position yourself awkwardly to confuse and throw off your opponents.

Dodging Skill increased by 20% of Intelligence, enables "Mighty Throw" and "Ballista Throw" techniques.
Lasts 1 turn.
onpause_buffs.name: Baffling Defense

data.description: Shii-Cho, "The way of the Sarlacc" was the first form lightsaber combat developed by the Jedi during their transition from metal weaponry to lightsabers.  Shii-Cho is regarded as a training form that all Jedi learn to understand the basics of armed combat.  Shii-Cho excels at fighting against groups but lacks the offensive power of the other lightsaber forms.
initiate: You place one foot back and hold your weapon vertically on your dominant side.
%s places one foot back and hold their weapon vertically.

static_buffs.description:
You are a determined warrior.  Your inner calm aids you in landing your strikes and protecting yourself.

Blocked damage reduced by 100% of Strength, +1 Accuracy.
static_buffs.name: Determination

static_buffs.description:
Your training in Shii-Cho teaches you how to combat multiple opponents.

+1 block attempts, +1 block effectiveness.
static_buffs.name: Apprentice Training

static_buffs.description:
Further training in Shii-Cho improves your ability to combat multiple opponents.

+1 block attempts, +1 block effectiveness.
static_buffs.name: Knight Training

static_buffs.description:
As a master of Shii-Cho, your ability to fight against groups is second to none.

+1 block attempts, +1 block effectiveness.
static_buffs.name: Master Training

data.description: The Stone Dragon discipline for focuses on strength, power, and toughness.  Its teachings grant a martial adept the ability to splinter steel with a single, focused blow.  Stone Dragon's defensive abilities focus on tapping into the enduring power of stone to turn aside attacks.
initiate: You dig your heels into the ground and steady yourself.
%s digs their heels into the ground.

oncrit_buffs.description:
When you make a successful attack, you enter a meditative state that leaves you almost invulnerable to harm.

+5 bash, cut, and stab armor.
Lasts 1 turn.
oncrit_buffs.name: Iron Bones

onhit_buffs.description:
You focus your energy to enhance your defenses, drawing on the power of your weapon's impact with a foe to toughen yourself against a counterattack.

+1 bash, cut, and stab armor.
Lasts 1 turn.  Stacks 5 times.
onhit_buffs.name: Stone Bones

onmove_buffs.description:
Moving too much will negate the effects of Surefoot Stance.  Stay still to avoid shattering your stance!

Enables "Shattered Stone" buff.
Lasts 1 turn.
onmove_buffs.name: Cracked Stone

onmove_buffs.description:
You are unable to maintain your Surefoot Stance and must stop moving for a short time to regain its benefits.

-10% damage, -2 bash, cut, and stab armor.
Lasts 4 turn.
onmove_buffs.name: Stattered Stone

static_buffs.description:
You crouch and set your feet flat on the ground, drawing the resilience of the earth into your body.  However, moving too much will break your stance.

+10% damage, +2 bash, cut, and stab armor.
static_buffs.name: Stonefoot Stance

data.description: The Tiger Claw discipline embraces a feral rage that lurks within the heart of its initiates.  In battle, such warriors growl like wild animals, attack with a furry similar to that of a barbarian, and rely on overwhelming, vicious assaults to defeat their enemies.
initiate: You emit a low growl as you prepare for battle.
%s hunkers down like a wild animal.

oncrit_buffs.description:
The smell of blood drives you into a fury.  You want more.  NOW!

+1 Accuracy, +15% damage.
Lasts 1 turn.  Stacks 2 times.
oncrit_buffs.name: Blood In The Water

ongethit_buffs.description:
A cornered animal is a terrifying and dangerous creature.  You are no different.

-20% move cost.
Lasts 1 turn.
ongethit_buffs.name: Cornered Predator

onkill_buffs.description:
You scythe through weaker foes like a mighty predator turned loose among a herd of prey.

+30 Speed.
Lasts 2 turns.  Stacks 2 times
onkill_buffs.name: Prey on the Weak

onmove_buffs.description:
With the roar of a wild beast, you throw yourself into the fray.  Strike first and strike hard.

+2 Accuracy, +10% damage.
Lasts 1 turn.
onmove_buffs.name: Pounching Charge

static_buffs.description:
Always strike with full force.  Never hold back anything unless you want to die.

+2 Accuracy, n+15 speed, +25% damage.
static_buffs.name: Improved Critical

data.description: You are a pupil of the Venom Clan.  You start with one of the five deadly venoms: Centipede, Viper, Scorpion, Lizard, or Toad.
You have lingering memories of training to fight cyborgs and war machines in zero gravity using the obscure Panzer Kunst.
The ancient arts of drunken brawling come naturally to you!  While under the influence of alcohol, your melee skill will rise considerably, especially unarmed combat.
You have studied the deeds and legends of ancient heroes.  From your research, you have learned an ancient form of combat called Hylian Swordsmanship.
You are trained in the ways of the Jedi.  Your knowledge allows you to utilize a form of lightsaber combat.
You are well versed in the monsterous Pocket Fist martial art.  Train well, because it is your destiny to be a master.
You are a martial adept and learned one of the martial disciplines of the Sublime Way.  You start with your choice of Desert Wind, Diamond Mind, Iron Heart, Setting Sun, Stone Dragon, or Tiger Claw.
A combat-ready cyborg once salvaged from an obscure junkyard…

When cast, the mage opens his mouth and sprays acid in a wide cone to dissolve his foes into goo.  Just imagine what he'll do with the goo.

Paralytic side effect of Projection.

Turns your biological mastery inwards, medically enhancing your flesh.  Rather than strength of healing, it staves off blood loss and purges wounds before they can turn septic, at the cost of increased hunger and thirst.

data.//: Listed as a recover energy effect with a negative modifier that decreases with each level of the spell, which makes it cause damage instead.
data.description: Increases pain
data.message:
Your veins feel like they are on fire!
You start regenerating mana!

data.description: You probably shouldn't be seeing this
Because "ammo" doesn't let me do it right
Because "ammo" doesn't let me do it right
Because "ammo" doesn't let me do it right
Causes an intense heat at the location, damaging the target.

Summons a small flame that does not burn you, but you can use it to light things on fire.  It seems to need you to have some intent to light things on fire, because you are able to put it in your pocket with no issue.
Causes jagged icicles to form in the air above the target, falling and damaging it.
You hurl a pea-sized glowing orb that when reaches its target or an obstacle produces a pressure-less blast of searing heat.
You project a glowing white crystal of ice and it explodes on impact into a blossom of shattering cold.

data.//: Look, this isn't technically using the same system as the rest of the stat adjustments, but field intensity is something I probably shouldn't fuck with too much.
data.description: You blast a cone of frigid air toward the target.
You're pretty sure you saw this in a game somewhere.  You fire a short-range cone of fire.
You're pretty sure you saw this in a game somewhere.  You fire a short-range cone of ice and cold.
Freezes the touched target with intense cold.
Encases your feet in a magical coating of ice, allowing you to glide along smooth surfaces faster.
Creates a magical shield of ice on your arm, you can defend yourself with it in melee combat and use it to bash.
Covers you in a thin layer of magical ice to protect you from harm.
This ritual creates a small pebble attuned to Kelvinists.  You can use the rune as a catalyst for recipes.
This spell ignites a wooden sword, creating a flaming blade able to burn, bruise, and chop.
data.name: Flamesword

data.//: missing flag: IGNITE_FLAMMABLE
data.description: This spell ignites dust scattered in the air, creating a cone of flame.  The hot ashes can cling to targets, causing additional burns over time.
You call the power of the scorching summer to roast the earth.  Several fireballs fly from your finger tips to strike the target.
You call the power of the frigid winter to freeze the earth.  Several ice crystals fly from your finger tips to strike the target.
Uses your control over temperature to make yourself immune to the effects of the cold.
Uses your control over temperature to make yourself immune to the effects of the heat and fire.
Summons a permanent crocodile.
data.name: Summon Crocodile

data.description: Causes one of the shaman spells to be cast.
data.name: an ancient reptilian spell

data.description: I cast Magic Missile at the darkness!
Teleports you in a random direction a short distance.
Summons a well of gravity with the epicenter at the location.  Deals bashing damage to all creatures in the affected area.
A blast of concentrated magical power that obliterates a large area.
A bolt of magical power that only damages your foes.
This spell gives you an enormous boost of speed lasting a short period of time.
A beam of focused magical power that damages any foes in its path.
Teleports you in a random direction a medium distance, to help escape your foes in dangerous situations.
This ritual creates a small pebble attuned to Magi.  You can use the rune as a catalyst for recipes.
You become more graceful, agile, and coordinated.
You gain the perception of an eagle.
You gain the strength of an ogre.
You become wily like a fox.
Crystallizes mana into solid form.  Your physiological changes have made this spell much more efficient and easier to cast.
Fires bolts of mana from your fingertips that home in on randomly selected targets in range.
Sucks blood from one foe.
A trap that summons bears!  Not what you were expecting, is it?
data.name: Bear Trap

data.description: Ejects giant fist from arm.
data.name: Rocket Punch

data.description: Spreads toxic gas around itself.
data.name: Gas Attack

data.description: This is a monster only spell.
data.name: Demon Fireball

data.description: Summons 4 permanent demon spiderlings.
data.name: Summon Demon Spiderlings

data.description: Separated from the player burning hands, because I'm not trying to accidentally buff Demon Spiders again.
Carcinization ray, go!  (Krabgek version of Necrotic Gaze for balance purposes)
Someone's pudding recipe has gone *very* awry…  (Monster Spell)

data.//: stab damage for the sake of being able to resist it
data.description: They cast Magic Missile at your puny head!  (Monster Spell)
Perfect for evening out damage on breath attacks
A short-ranged fan of electricity shoots from your fingers.

The goto spell for many Stormshapers, this iconic spell does just what you expect: you shoot lightning from your fingertips.  However, this lightning is more directed than most lightning, and travels in a line through most non-solid targets.
A powerful blast of wind slams into anything in front of your outstretched hand.
A magical wind pushes you forward as you move, easing your movements and increasing speed.
Creates a crackling magical warhammer full of lightning to smite your foes with, and of course, smash things to bits!
This ritual creates a small pebble attuned to Stormshapers.  You can use the rune as a catalyst for recipes.
You fire a small concentrated ball of lightning at the target.  The electricity diffuses quickly, so it doesn't do much damage, but you're able to fire off several quick ones in a row.
You call the power of the sky to strike the earth.  Several lightning blasts fire from your finger tips to strike the target.

By manipulating the charge in the air, you can conjure a sharp snap of lightning over a wide area.  While its destructive potential is a far cry from natural lightning, the light and thunderclap produced will leave your foes reeling.
Adds the actual flashbang effect.
Draws forth a broad wall of thick fog.  While the sudden force of air pressure will floor any enemies caught in it, the conjuration is otherwise harmless.
Draws water forth from the air then condenses it down into usable water.  Handy in situations where you just don't have reliable access to water, but have access to a method of cleaning it.
Draws water forth from the air then condenses it into fully cleaned water.  Takes more finesse than simply condensing normal water, but that's to be expected.
Uses your control over electricity to make yourself immune to its effects..
Creates a magical field that hides your visual presence to others.  Colloquially known as invisibility, but without all the science mumbo jumbo.
data.message: To the outside world, your body fades away and you cease to exist!

data.description: Creates a magical lamp.
You have found a way to convert your spiritual energy into power you can use for your bionics.
This ritual creates a small pebble attuned to Technomancers.  You can use the rune as a catalyst for recipes.
This spell creates a very short range bolt of electricity to shock your foes.

This spell manipulates some quantum something or other to tunnel you through a short distance of space, and even matter, unfortunately there's that whole uncertainty thing as to where you come out.  It leaves you a little dazed on the other side as you reorient yourself.

This spell stimulates the synapses in your brain beyond normal processing speeds, giving you a large boost in mental processing capability, including enhancing your reflexes, speed, and raw intellectual power.  Use responsibly!
You concentrate and release a focused beam of photons at a target, also known as a laser.
This spell conjures flying animated blades that will cut your enemies down to size.  Into small pieces that is.
This spell manipulates light into barely tangible duplicates of a living being, a magical hologram in short.
Allows you to swap places with a previously existing holographic image of yourself.  If the universe itself can't tell you apart, who could?
Summons a floating disk that is sworn to carry your burdens.
The side effects of casting the overcharge spell.
You overcharge your internal batteries to send a semi-directed beam from your face.  The inventor of this spell must have had some weird sense of humor.
data.message: You overcharge your bionic energy through what ley lines you have left, and channel it through the center of your face.

data.description: A large gem made with crystallized mana and some other stabilizing metals.  Comes with a specially designed power pack (installed into the skull) that does not interfere with your normal facial functions.  WARNING: for Technophile use only.  By using this spell you are waiving all liability of Frikken Laser Beams Inc.  and its subsidiaries.

data.apply_message: Channeling so much mana is making you tired
desc: You are exhausted from channeling a lot of mana.
name: Mana Fatigue
data.remove_message: The burden of mana fatigue has faded

data.apply_message: You are bolstered and pushed along by the power of the wind
desc: You are bolstered and pushed along by the power of the wind.
name: Windrunning
data.remove_message: The wind at your back dies down.

data.apply_message: Your sight adjusts to the darkness.
desc: You can see in the dark.
name: Dark Sight
data.remove_message: The darkness loses its shape.

data.apply_message: Ethereal arms shoot out of the ground and grab onto you!
desc: Ghostly arms are trying to hold you in place!
name: Ethereal Hold
data.remove_message: The ghostly arms fade away.

data.apply_message: You fade away.
desc: Nothing can see you.
name: Invisibility
data.remove_message: You can see your hands again.

data.apply_message: You are filled with energy that improves everything you do!
desc: You are filled with energy that improves everything you do.
name: Blessed
data.remove_message: Your energy fades.

data.apply_message: Your body ripples with writhing alien muscles, your limbs lengthen, and your eyes glow with a faint green.
desc: Your body ripples with writhing alien muscles, your limbs lengthen, and your eyes glow with a faint green.
name: Grotesque Enhancement
data.remove_message: Your body rapidly returns to normal.

data.apply_message: Roots and vines entangle your foes to slow them!
desc: Roots and vines entangle your foes.
name: Vegetative Grasp
data.remove_message: The roots and vines wither up and die.

data.apply_message: Roots rip out from the ground and impale your enemies!
desc: Roots and vines entangle your foes.
name: Root Impale
data.remove_message: The roots wither up and die.

desc: Burned with acid
name: Acidic burn

data.apply_message: Your speed is boosted to superhuman levels!
desc: Your speed is boosted enormously.
name: Hasted
data.remove_message: You return to your normal speed.

data.apply_message: Your mind accelerates.
desc: Your mental processing is increased.
name: Synaptic Stimulation
data.remove_message: Your mind returns to normal speed.

data.apply_message: You feel strong!
desc: You have the strength of an Ogre!
name: Ogre's Strength
data.remove_message: Your strength deflates.

data.apply_message: You notice small details!
desc: You have the perception of an Eagle!
name: Eagle's Sight
data.remove_message: Your vision returns to normal.

data.apply_message: Your reflexes are heightened!
desc: You have the dexterity of a cat!
name: Cat's Grace
data.remove_message: Your reflexes return to normal.

data.apply_message: Your intelligence is heightened!
desc: You have the cunning of a Fox!
name: Fox's Cunning
data.remove_message: Your intelligence returns to normal.

data.apply_message: Your skin tingle with the power of the Devs!
desc: You can not be harmed by anything.
name: Debug Full Protection
data.remove_message: Your skin stops tingling, your life is empty and meaningless again.

data.apply_message: Your body feels light as a feather.
desc: You  are light as a feather and fall like one.
name: Debug Feather Fall
data.remove_message: The earth pulls you down hard.

data.apply_message: You are afraid!
desc: Your knees are shaking, your heart beats fast, and your stomach rebels.
name: Scared
Frightened
Terrified
data.remove_message: Your fear dissipates.

desc: You feel sickened from overtaxing your body, having extended your influence over such a wide area.
name: Visceral Overexertion

desc: Immunity to bleeding and bites, increased stamina regeneration, increased hunger and thirst gain.
name: Coagulant Weave
data.remove_message: The tension running through your flesh fades.

data.//: Basically just paralyze poison set to work in a manner useful for spells.
desc: You feel sluggish and weak, from magically-induced poisoning.
name: Biomantic Venom

desc: This burn really hurts!

data.//: This is the best I can do in terms of making it 'never miss' generally
desc: Let's see this foe try and dodge the powerful Gungnir NOW!

decay_messages: Your ward against cold is waning.
desc: The cold never bothers you anymore, since becoming a kelvinist.
name: Ward Against Ice
data.remove_message: You feel the icy fingers of frost running along your back once more.

decay_messages: Your ward against fire is waning.
desc: You feel like a firebird, able to walk through flames without a care in the world!
name: Ward Against Fire
data.remove_message: You feel phantom flames licking at your feet for a brief moment.

decay_messages: Your ward against acid is waning.
desc: While normally this would just be a godsend for chemists and people with acid reflux, the Cataclysm has made it an even more useful.
name: Ward Against Acid
data.remove_message: You suddenly feel the pain of your stomach acid eating at your flesh for but a moment.

decay_messages: Your ward against anomalous effects is waning.
desc: Protects against the effects of being around otherworldly beings
name: Ward Against Anomalous
data.remove_message: For a brief moment, you experience what it's like to be a conspiracy theorist thinking that everything is watching you.

decay_messages: Your ward against lightning is waning.
desc: Increases your resistance to approximately 180 Teraohms, making you immune to electricity.
name: Ward Against Lightning
data.remove_message: You get startled by your first static shock in a long time.

desc: You're protected against common poisons and other adventuring threats.
name: Adventurer's Cure
data.remove_message: You feel the anti-poison poultice wearing down in effect.

data.apply_message: As you finish your meditation, you feel your reflexes heighten!
desc: Your reflexes are razor-sharp!
name: Blademaster's Repose
data.remove_message: Your reflexes return to normal.

hit_you_effect.message: Mjolnir's lightning arcs out and pierces %2$s!
Gungnir's incredible balance makes it so that your foe may not evade thine strikes!
The trickster's staff hobbles thine enemies!
The trickster's staff summons a lemon!
The trickster's staff chills your enemies to the bone!

data.info: This clothing has an owlbear fur lining sewn into it to <good>greatly increase</good> its overall <info>warmth</info>.
This clothing has a demon chitin padding sewn into it to <good>greatly increase</good> its overall <info>fire resistance</info>.
This clothing has a coating of black dragon scales applied to it in order to <good>greatly increase</good> its overall <info>acid resistance</info>.

data.description: A gate for translocation.  Cast the translocation spell or use a translocator to choose this gate as a destination.
data.name: Translocator Gate

data.description: This is a rough magic circle, carved into the ground and decorated with blood, candles, and other small knick-knacks.
data.name: Magic Circle

data.description: Something about this doesn't look right.
data.name: large glowing boulder

data.description: An ornate oak cabinet topped by a durable resin countertop resistant to most alchemical spills and burns.  It has wired in electrical and gas fittings, and has been decorated with several protection runes - mostly ornamental.
data.name: enchanter's workbench

data.description: A large glass and copper alembic for distilling alchemical concoctions.  It consists of a copper pot with rising spires of twisted glass draining into various removable bottles.
data.name: standing alembic

data.description: This is a beautiful, non-scale model of the solar system.  A complex series of gears allows the relative motions of the planets to be studied at the turn of a crank.  This more modern version also has bluetooth and could have been controlled with an app, if there was any power anymore.
data.name: orrery

data.description: This is a mana crystal that juts from the ground as if it had sprouted up like a weed.  It pulses with a delicate yellow energy, occasionally bursting with flashes of pent-up light.
data.name: huge mana crystal

data.description: This is big stone altar.  Most commonly used in morally questionable rituals.
data.name: stone altar

data.description: This is a forge made of the chitin of a huge, red spider that has a penchant for flames.  Custom made to withstand the heat from alumentum, this forge can resmelt the magical metals into their workable, ingot form.
data.name: demon forge

These are martial manuals that a beginner would have, or scrolls that would have this tier or one tier higher of spells.
Lower tier recipes, many of which can be done with the alchemist rune.  Usually has at least one recipe requiring related school rune or rune weapon
Higher tier recipes, where most school-related recipes require their rune or rune weapon.

data.//: In terms of alchemy the gastrolith could serve to combie different effects, such as safely mixing together potions, or it could be used as an element of change, such as for shapechanging potions.
data.description: This strangely shaped rock was once a part of an owlbear's complex digestive system, creating a link between owl throat and bear stomach.  It is possible that it could serve a similar purpose in alchemy, helping to bind together two disparate halves.
data.name: owlbear gastrolith

data.//: Potion recipes that require a full owlbear egg could also instead require larger amounts of stone shell.  Since 1 egg gives 3 shells, you could perhaps have 1 egg be equivalent to 5 or more shells when making potions.
data.description: The broken fragment of an owlbear egg.  With luck it might still contain some of its former power, though if nothing else it's still a bit sharp.
data.name: stone shell

data.description: Strong alcohol, infused with mana and concentrated into a liquid that can stabilize spells into liquid form.  You can still drink it, if you want.
data.name: potion starter

data.description: Pure ethanol saturated with magical energy.  The sheer power concentrated within causes the surface of the potion to ripple continuously.
data.name: superior potion starter

data.description: An organ located above the kidneys responsible for secretion of adrenaline, cortisol, and aldosterone.  This one is huge, whether by nature or mutation.
The powdered remains of a will-o-wisps's phsyical form.  It seems to still possess an otherworldly glow.
data.name: glow dust

data.description: As a bulette burrows through the earth its gills collect minute amounts of precious metals and gems which slowly aggregate into lustrous gemstones prized for their beauty and power.
data.name: bulette pearl

data.description: This is the magical essence from a dragon, distilled into a concentrated form.
data.name: dragon essence

data.description: A long sucking apparatus harvested from stirge corpse.  Makes a poor melee weapon.
A fang from a demon spider.  It seems to still drip with poison; you might be able to use this in some alchemical recipe?
data.name: demon spider fang

data.description: Alumentum is magically processed coal or charcoal.  It burns as hot as magnesium, and for a significantly longer period of time.  This makes it quite a useful material to produce for many mages.
Crystallized mana in powdered form.  It faintly pulses with arcane energy.
data.name: mana dust

data.description: Ichaival, the bow of Odin.  Rumored to fire 10 arrows with every pull of the string.  It has gold and silver ornaments on it, as well as an ornate Raven.
An arrow composed of a sliver of orichalcum.  The arrow has a mysterious glow.  Has a very high chance of staying intact when fired, however can only be fired from Ichaival.
data.name: orichalcum arrow

data.description: A pair of arm guards crafted from the carefully cleaned and pruned red exoskeletons of demon spiders.  Fire-resistant and very durable.

name.str: pair of demon chitin arm guards
name.str_pl: pairs of demon chitin arm guards

data.description: Leg and body armor crafted from the carefully cleaned and pruned red exoskeletons of demon spiders.  Fire-resistant and very durable.
A helmet crafted from the carefully cleaned and pruned red exoskeletons of demon spiders.  Covers the entire head; fire-resistant and very durable.
Gauntlets crafted from the carefully cleaned and pruned red exoskeletons of demon spiders.  Fire-resistant and very durable.
Boots crafted from carefully cleaned and pruned pruned red exoskeletons of demon spiders.  Fire-resistant and very durable.
A makeshift harness of demon chitin fitted to a thin mesh protecting the neck to flank of canines.  You could put this on a friendly dog.
A makeshift assembly of criniere, peytral and croupiere made from demon chitin fitted to a thin mesh.  You could put this on a friendly horse.

By using this spell you are waiving all liability of Frikken Laser Beams Inc.  and its subsidiaries.
A scale from a black dragon.  It still has its magical properties and acid resistance.
data.name: black dragon scale

data.description: A carefully folded raw hide harvested from a black dragon.  It is a large enough piece that it is workable to make armor, and with enough scales you could make scale mail.
data.name: raw black dragon hide

data.description: A treated black dragon hide which is undergoing the chemical processes required to become workable.  You will be able to activate it to unroll and make use of it when it is done.
data.name: tanning black dragon hide

use_action.msg: You carefully unfold the black dragon hide and shake it clean.
use_action.not_ready_msg: The black dragon hide isn't done yet.

data.description: Prepared hide from a black dragon.  Hard, acid-resistant, and with more scales could make a suit of armor as hard as steel and half as heavy.
data.name: black dragon hide

data.description: Boots made of black dragonscale.  Very protective, and surprisingly light.
Boots made of black dragonhide.  Very protective, and surprisingly light.
A helmet made from black dragonscale, held together with black dragonhide.  It comes equipped with a full face visor.
data.name: black dragonscale helmet

data.description: A helmet made from black dragonhide.  It protects your head well, and doesn't cover your face.
data.name: black dragonhide helmet

data.description: A full suit of black dragon scale mail.  It comes with all the accoutrements that cover your torso, legs, and arms, with the benefit of being very light and flexible.
data.name: black dragonscale armor

data.description: A full suit of black dragonhide armor.  It comes with all the accoutrements that cover your torso, legs, and arms, with the benefit of being very light and flexible.
data.name: black dragonhide armor

data.description: A pair of heavy-duty gauntlets made of black dragonscale that covers your hands.
A pair of customized, Kevlar armored leather gloves, modified to be easy to wear while providing maximum protection under extreme conditions.
Massive boots made of black dragonscale, modified to fit even the strangest of bodies.  Very protective, and surprisingly light.
