This is a glossy brochure encouraging students to book vactaions at a lake retreat or remote cabin.  The brochure includes lush photographs of a tower on an island and a remote looking cabin in the woods.  It includes a map of the areas.
data.name: vacation brochure

use_action.message: You add the locations to your map.

data.description: This is an well worn map.  It has pictures of fantastical beasts embellishing the carefully drawn map markers.
data.name: lair map

use_action.message: You add the locations to your map.

data.//: Unique item for magic_basement.
data.description: A photo of a jovial, old wizard, he seems to be dancing with a coat rack in this basement.  There is a stack of suitcases in the background.
data.name: old photo

data.description: This magical pebble has an insignia of rended flesh and bones on it.  It is necessary for Biomancers to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of clockwork and gears on it.  It is necessary for Technomancers to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of crystal and mana orbs on it.  It is necessary for Magi to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of steel and rocks on it.  It is necessary for Earthshapers to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of ice and flames on it.  It is necessary for Kelvinists to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of lightning and storm clouds on it.  It is necessary for Stormshapers to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of nature and trees on it.  It is necessary for Druids to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of summoners on it.  It is necessary for Animists to channel magic into their crafts.
This magical pebble has an insignia of alchemy and potions on it.  While versatile in use, the lack of attunement to any school prevents creation of more advanced recipes.

data.//: Uses damage numbers from +1 steel spear, but not much else
data.description: A grotesque bone spearhead on a stout wooden pole.  There is a Biomancer rune embedded at the base of the head.

data.//: Combat stats based off crowbar +1, techniques off Halligan bar(closest non-magical substitute), weight based on 75% of hammer & wrench(since their handles aren't included) + 100% crowbar with benefit from +1 enchantment
data.description: This staff incorporates a sturdy cresent wrench on top of a prybar and a hammer on the other in a convienent package.  There is a Technomancer rune embedded in the hammerhead.

data.//: The classical vision of the wizard gets a classic weapon.  DPS Stats are between the regular and ironshod versions.  Stats are slightly worse than the QS+1 due to the glass weight slowing attack speed.
data.description: A quarterstaff with runes carved into it and two glass jars, heat-tempered and infused with mana for durability, to act as mana receptacles.  There are two Magi runes embedded at the tips.

data.//: Flame-bladed sword covers half of Kelvinist's heat-cold theme.  Combat stats equivalent to broadsword +1 with BRUTAL technique.
data.description: A sword with an undulating blade, reminiscent of a flame.  There is a Kelvinist rune embedded in the pommel.

data.//: Equivalent to copper ax +1, with volume reduction so it can be sheathed like the other school weapons.  Metals chosen for being two most conductive metals + balancing reasons
data.description: A forged copper axe with silver trimmings and a wooden handle.  There is a Stormshaper rune embedded in the eye.

data.//: Tool qualities equivalent to steak knife, combat equiv.  to hunting knife + 1 w/ RAPID and BLOCK1, size/weight off combat knife +1
data.description: A steel ritual knife used by Animists to draw blood for summoning.  Their school rune is embedded in the crossguard.
A custom-built leather utility belt that instantly creates any tool that you reach for.  Activate to sheathe/draw a weapon.

data.//: Equivalent to composite bow for dispersion/reload/weight/range/encumb/bash, with two mod slots added equivalent to other weapons getting techniques
data.description: A bow made of multiple materials to maximize energy efficiency.  There are two Druid runes embedded at the tips.

data.//: Equivalent to cestus +1 with BRUTAL and WBLOCK1
data.description: A stone battle glove with carved runes encasing the hand, protecting it while increasing striking power.  There is an Earthshaper rune embedded in the palm.

data.//: Alchemically speaking, I see this egg as having the elements of Growth, Stone, and Egg.  Growth would make things grow faster, the simplest example being a magical liquid fertilizer.  Stone would be a defensive element, used in creating something like a potion of stoneskin.  Egg would be interesting though.  What if instead of being imbibed there were potions that instead functioned similarly to the sourdough items, or the blob vehicle parts, in that they take a gestation period and then you could activate them and have a new item pop out.  Creatures sure but especially biomancers could have temporarily-lived tools, weapons, and armor.
data.description: This egg laid by an owlbear seems almost indistinguishable from a large rock until you touch it and can feel the warm glow of potential life energy from within.  It's hard to believe that an owlbear could grow so quickly from something so small.  Perhaps you could carefully crack it open to get at the liquid golden goodness inside.
data.name: owlbear egg

data.description: The liquid innards of an owlbear egg.  Good eating.
data.name: owlbear egg yolk

data.description: A big, ugly ball of animal spit and licked-off hairs.  Don't swallow it.
The meat from a slain dragon.  It does not seem to respond to cooking the same way as other meat, making it obvious that it still retains some magical properties.
The mushrooms harvested from a dead shrieker.  Could be used in potions.
data.name: scream mushroom

data.description: Indistinguishable from pre-Cataclysm lab grown beef.  It should be excellent but somehow it's just edible.
data.name: purified meat

data.description: Not as tainted as previously and tastes like the real thing.  You do not want to cook this for your friends, though if you do they won't know the difference for a while.
data.name: impure meat

data.description: A broken clay golem, looking like a piece of post-modern art.  Could be smashed for clay.
data.name: broken clay golem

data.description: A broken plastic golem, like a giant action figure chewed up by an equally giant puppy.  You could smash it up into recycled plastic bits.
data.name: broken plastic golem

data.description: A broken stone golem, not that much different from big boulder.  Could be smashed for stone.
data.name: broken stone golem

data.description: A broken iron golem, with all iron you would possibly ever need.  Could be smashed for iron.
data.name: broken iron golem

data.description: A broken resin golem, slowly becoming more and more of a puddle.  You could recover some small amount of materials from it, but it'll be difficult considering how liquid it is.
data.name: broken fresh resin golem

data.description: A broken resin golem, looking a bit like a big pile of toffee.  You can recover some materials from it, but some wastage will definitely happen.
data.name: broken semi-cured resin golem

data.description: A broken resin golem, now reduced to a pile of rubble.  You could recover some materials from it if you were to work at it for a while.
data.name: broken cured resin golem

data.description: A simple carved staff, made of wood.  It faintly glows with magic when you cast spells.  Wielding it slightly increases your mana capacity
A beautifully carved staff, made of enchanted wood and mithril.  It faintly glows with magic when you cast spells, but it is not a sturdy melee weapon.

A beautifully carved staff, made of enchanted wood and mithril.  It faintly glows with magic when you cast spells, but it is not a sturdy melee weapon.  Wielding it greatly increases your mana capacity.
A blue pointed hat with stars stiched into it.  Wearing it increases your mana regeneration.
data.name: wizard hat

data.description: Use with caution!  Flammable!  Explosive!
data.name: fireball hammer

data.description: A leather belt.  Useful for making your pair of pants fit.
data.name: magic leather belt

data.description: The mythical belt of Thor, god of thunder.  Or at least so it appears.  It doubles the wearer's base strength.
A wide girdle that fits around your waist, coverd in numerous small pouches that hold a lot more than they should, and the weight of their contents is greatly reduced.
A wide girdle that fits around your waist, coverd in numerous small pouches that hold a lot more than they should, and the weight of their contents is greatly reduced.
A wide girdle that fits around your waist, you can sheath or holster any weapon into it in the blink of an eye, and it seemingly stores them somewhere else.
A braided but flexible belt seemingly made of metal.  You can activate it to transform it into a whip and flay your enemies.

use_action.msg: You grab the belt and it uncoils to become a flexible metal whip in your hand!

data.description: A long braided flexible steel bullwhip that narrows into a sharp blade at the end.  Easily capable of slicing and dicing anything that comes at you.  It transforms back into a belt.

use_action.msg: You loop the whip in your hand and it coils back into a belt form in an instant.

data.description: Rugged yet extremely comfortable and well fitting boots of worn leather and steel, they look like they've seen a lot of use and will likely see a lot more.  They make your movement a lot less work.
Rugged yet extremely comfortable and well fitting boots of worn leather and steel, they look like they've seen a lot of use and will likely see a lot more.  They make your movement a lot less work.

Rugged yet extremely comfortable and well fitting boots of worn leather and steel, these boots can be activated once a day to escape from nasty situations, teleporting you a good distance in a random direction.
Rugged yet extremely comfortable and well fitting boots of leather with small engraved runes seemingly filled with rubber.  When worn, you are immune to damage from electricity.
A full assembly of medieval arm protection.
A light but extremely sturdy steel bracer with an ornate shield engraved on the top, silver accentuates the intricate design.  It protects your body with a light aura to reduce damage you take.
A light but extremely sturdy steel bracer with an ornate shield engraved on the top, gold accentuates the intricate design.  It protects your body with a strong aura to reduce damage you take.

A light but extremely sturdy steel bracer with an ornate bundle of lightning bolts engraved on the top, silver accentuates the intricate design.  It protects your body with a light aura to reduce electrical damage you take, as well as being able to release a Jolt spell 3 times a day.

A light but extremely sturdy steel bracer with an ornate bundle of lightning bolts engraved on the top, gold accentuates the intricate design.  It protects your body with a strong aura to reduce electrical damage you take, as well as being able to release a Lightning Bolt spell 3 times a day.

data.//: Combination of the doubled best stats of the homemade & solvent trap suppressors w/ +1 enchantment & volume reduction to half
data.description: Rather than using purely wipe media, an additional localized silence spell in this tube quiets gunshots going through to hearing-safe levels.

A small visible-light laser using light shown through a mana crystal that mounts on a firearm's accessory rail to enhance ease and speed of target acquisition.  Aside from increased weight, there are no drawbacks.  You can rotate the attachment rail to fit under the barrel.

use_action.msg: You rotate the laser sight.

data.description: A small visible-light laser using light shown through a mana crystal that mounts on a firearm's accessory rail to enhance ease and speed of target acquisition.  Aside from increased weight, there are no drawbacks.  You can rotate the attachment rail to fit on the rail.

use_action.msg: You rotate the laser sight.

data.description: Adds a blue dot optic made from crystallized mana to the top of your gun, replacing the iron sights.  Increases accuracy and weight.
data.name: mana dot sight

data.description: A generic magic mask.
data.name: magic mask

data.description: A mask with no facial features at all, just eye and mouth holes, upon activation it makes everything ignore your presence for a while.
A decidedly steampunk-looking half mask that covers the eye area of the face, it has large lenses that correct and greatly enhance the vision of the wearer.
This versatile weapon uses Technomancy-enhanced springs to keep the staff tips retracted while in baton configuration.  Activate to extend.

use_action.msg: You snap open your springstaff into staff mode.

data.description: This versatile weapon uses Technomancy-enhanced springs to keep the staff tips from retracting while in staff configuration.  Activate to extend.

use_action.msg: You collapse your springstaff into baton mode.

data.description: A smooth steel cube the size of your fist.  Several buttons on the sides activate the powers of the cube.
data.name: heat cube

use_action.msg: You push the torch button and the cube emits a large flame from the top, one that does radiate heat, but won't burn anything.

data.description: The heat cube in the torch configuration, where it emits warmth and a bright flame that does not burn.

use_action.msg: The torch flame is extinguished.

data.description: A small gold skeleton key.  You can activate it to unlock locked things.
This is a high quality engraved wooden torch.  On command, the tip bursts into flame and produces a fair amount of light.  It will burn forever.

use_action.msg: You light the torch.

data.//: Roughly +25% fire damage

use_action.msg: The torch is extinguished.
You open the flask and discover it full of sweet, sweet, whiskey!
use_action.not_ready_msg: The flask isn't done refilling yet.

data.description: This is a high quality, engraved steel kit with a variety of needles, some plastic spools for thread, some small scissors, even a small heating element for melting and joining plastic.  Use a tailor's kit to customize your clothing and armor.  This uses your tailoring skill.  It also contains one of those magic spiders that constantly, if slowly, makes new thread.
data.name: enchanted tailor's kit

data.description: This is a small glass box that contains a spider that diligently works day and night to produce silk thread that it stores in a reservoir you can open and retrieve it from.

Powered by the magic of glow powder and lesser mana potions, this extremely expensive little light will provide just enough light to read by for at least a decade.  The cover is closed.  Use it to open the cover and show the light.

use_action.msg: You open the nightlight's cover.

data.description: Powered by the magic of glow powder and lesser mana potions, this extremely expensive little light will provide just enough light to read by for at least a decade.  Use it to close the cover and hide the light.
data.name: magical reading light

use_action.msg: You close the nightlight's cover.

data.description: An ammo bag enchanted to slowly produce ammo over time.  In this case, it's tuned to .45 ACP.
An ammo bag enchanted to slowly produce ammo over time.  In this case, it's tuned to .357 magnum.
An ammo bag enchanted to slowly produce ammo over time.  In this case, it's tuned to .40 S&W.
This mana-devouring device is just the thing to knead the tension out and help you relax.  Wizards have needs too, after all.

A magically-enhanced update to the Phillips & Rodgers' M47 Medusa, a  multi-caliber revolver aimed at survivalists.  While Technomancy improves the reliability with smaller cartridges, it is not as accurate as dedicated caliber revolvers due to freebore.
Constructed similarly to a falcata, this forward-sloping blade has a short-barrel pump shotgun attached to the blade's spine for finishing blows or a first strike.
data.name: gunblade

data.description: A generic copper magic ring.
data.name: copper magic ring

data.description: A generic silver magic ring.
data.name: magic ring

data.description: A generic gold magic ring.
data.name: magic ring

data.description: A generic platinum magic ring.
data.name: magic ring

data.description: An ornate silver ring engraved with daggers that conjures a near perfect throwing knife into your hand on activation.
A thin silver band ring, depicting an eel coiled on itself.  Allows you to dodge an extra attack per turn.
data.name: eel ring

data.description: A thin gold band ring, depicting a bicephalous eel coiled on itself.  Allows you to dodge two extra attacks per turn.
A copper ring that makes you a little stronger when you wear it.
A silver ring that makes you a good bit stronger when you wear it.
A golden ring that makes you surprisingly stronger when you wear it.
A platinum ring that makes you much stronger when you wear it.
A copper ring that makes you a little more agile when you wear it.
A silver ring that makes you a good bit more agile when you wear it.
A golden ring that makes you surprisingly more agile when you wear it.
A platinum ring that makes you much more agile when you wear it.
A copper ring that makes you a little more intelligent when you wear it.
A silver ring that makes you a good bit more intelligent when you wear it.
A golden ring that makes you surprisingly more intelligent when you wear it.
A platinum ring that makes you much more intelligent when you wear it.
A copper ring that makes you a little more perceptive when you wear it.
A silver ring that makes you a good bit more perceptive when you wear it.
A golden ring that makes you eye-openingly more perceptive when you wear it.
A platinum ring that makes you much more perceptive when you wear it.
A copper ring that makes you a little faster when you wear it.
A silver ring that makes you a good bit faster when you wear it.
A golden ring that makes you quite hasty when you wear it.
A platinum ring that makes you much faster when you wear it.
A copper ring that reduces some of the force of damage you take when you wear it.
A silver ring that appreciably reduces some of the force of damage you take when you wear it.
A golden ring that greatly reduces some of the force of damage you take when you wear it.
A platinum ring that vastly reduces some of the force of damage you take when you wear it.
A large silver coin that, when activated by uttering the word on the back, turns into the item pictured on the front, in this case a longsword.
data.name: longsword token

use_action.msg: You say the command word engraved on the token, and it rapidly grows and morphs into a shiny pristine longsword!

data.//: Roughly +25% fire damage
data.description: This is a small flame you can hold in your hand.  With a thought, you can cause it to light something on fire.
data.name: finger firelighter

use_action.msg: You dim the flame.

data.description: This is a small flame you can hold in your hand.  With a thought, you can cause it to light something on fire, though it is currently dimmed.
data.name: finger firelighter (dimmed)

use_action.msg: You brighten the flame.

data.description: a magical light source that will light up a small area.
data.name: magic lamp

use_action.msg: You dim your spell until it's dark.

data.description: a magical aura that you know can be brightened into a powerful light.
data.name: magic lamp (dimmed)

use_action.msg: You return your spell to full brightness.

data.name: magic light
