data.description: A lightweight but tough shield crafted entirely of magical ice.
A magical slick icy coating on your feet.  While quite fast on flat floors, they make it difficult to move on rough terrain.
A crackling magical warhammer full of lightning to smite your foes with, and of course, smash things to bits!
Encases your arm and hand in a sheath of crackling magical lightning, you can punch and defend yourself with it in melee combat.
data.name: Stormfist

data.description: Encases your arm and hand in a sheath of crackling magical lightning, you can punch and defend yourself with it in melee combat.
A long, writhing, tentacle covered in sharp bonelike blades and spikey protrusions.
data.name: vicious tentacle whip

data.description: A large pouch of tough flesh on your back, filled with tiny tentacles that grasp and hold anything you place inside.  It shifts and adjusts itself to minimize encumbrance.
This is a wicked spear/halberd hybrid entirely created of bone.

data.//: Not using copy-from 'reflexbow', since wearability causes druid bow not to be wielded, and ammo / clip type causes it to require real arrows
data.description: A magically conjured ornate recurve bow of solid flexible wood.  A matching conjured wooden arrow appears when you draw the string back for firing.
A magical seed that can be squeezed to release purifying dust, which can then be used to purify up to a gallon of water

use_action.msg: You squeeze the seed in your palm, and it begins to turn to a fine dust.

data.description: This fine dust glows with a growing intensity
data.name: faintly glowing dust

data.description: An all-encompassing, invisible layer of magic distorts light around your body.  Allows you to dodge two extra attacks in a given turn.
data.name: obfuscating aura

data.description: An all-encompassing, invisible layer of protection against acid.
An all-encompassing, invisible layer of protection against acid.
data.name: greater acid resistance aura

data.description: A thin layer of magical ice, covering the entire body.
A thin layer of shifting, almost fluid living rock, covering the entire body.
Ouch, this really smarts!  It'll go away soon, maybe?
An all-encompassing, invisible layer of magical aura that protects you from the environment.
This wooden sword is ablaze!  It seems to be safe-ish to hold, but will burn up soon.
A pulsating club made of bone, stained with an ever-moving blood coating eager to absorb the living.
The wind at your back helping to ease your travel.
data.name: windrunning aura

data.description: A broadsword made out of concentrated magical light and glowing with holy power.  Let your blade cleave through these unholy monsters!
data.name: Holy Blade

data.description: Blood of a dragon, it radiates warmth and looking at it you see moving patterns form and disappear in it as if looking at an actual fire.
Blood that is filled to the brim with arcane energy.  It releases a faint blue glow.

A .45 ACP round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  While the round doesn't seem much better than a standard FMJ round at the moment, you get the feeling that it's hiding some special properties deep down.
data.name: Bulette .45 ACP

data.//: Half the number of guns take .357 magnum as take .38 at the moment. Besides, cute lil bonus already
data.description: A .357 Magnum round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  While the round doesn't seem much better than a standard FMJ round at the moment, you get the feeling that it's hiding some special properties deep down.  Some of this specialness is already displayed with the fact that it can even be used in guns that only take .38 special otherwise.
data.name: Bulette .357 Magnum

data.description: A .40 Smith and Wesson round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  While the round doesn't seem much better than a standard FMJ round at the moment, you get the feeling that it's hiding some special properties deep down.
data.name: Bulette .40 S&W

data.//: Damage specified manually because idk how to edit the armor pen and multiplier in particular otherwise
data.description: A .45 ACP round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  The essence of Earth infused into the bullet allows it to crumple armor with ease
data.name: Bulette .45 ACP Enhanced

data.//: Half the number of guns take .357 magnum as take .38 at the moment.
data.description: A .357 Magnum round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  The Air energy infused into it allows it to act as practically a pocket-sniper.
data.name: Bulette .357 Magnum Enhanced

data.description: A .40 Smith and Wesson round with what looks like a small bulette pearl as the projectile.  The Fire imbued into it has made it quite the spicy round, dealing large amounts of damage as well as having some incendiary properties.  Not terribly good against armor though.
data.name: Bulette .40 S&W Enhanced

data.description: Some crystallized mana.  This can be reloaded into rechargable mana crystals, but can never be unloaded.
This is a small mana crystal specifically designed to be attached to wand tips.

data.//: 3 Aventurer techniques
data.description: This looks like a fairly standard beginner HEMA manual, but some of the points in particular sound a bit more like fantasy than reality.

name.str_pl: copies of A Beginner's Guide to Adventuring

data.//: 3 Aventurer techniques
data.description: This book looks like a fairly standard historical foraging or herbal remedies guide, but the claims it makes are simply outlandish!

name.str: A Guide to Common Adventuring Remedies
name.str_pl: copies of A Guide to Common Adventuring Remedies

data.//: 2 Aventurer techniques
data.description: A clever little book that tells you some neat tricks using the natural environment.

name.str: The Guide to Natural Adventuring Tools
name.str_pl: copies of The Guide to Natural Adventuring Tools

data.//: 3 Blademaster techniques
data.description: Interspersed with weeaboo stories that would make a 5chan board sarcastically clap, you find some surprisingly detailed notes on a few specific techniques. But there's no chance they work... right?

data.//: 4 Blademaster techniques
data.description: A collection of haikus detailing the importance of swiftness when wielding a blade, as well as how to apply the philosophy more generally. Just as the descriptions of the techniques are concise, so must your strikes be.

data.//: 2 Blademaster techniques
data.description: A historical text on the importance of the swordsman being just as strong and sturdy as his blade, complete with illustrations and proverbs.

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: Sometimes, you have to spin to win! Those enemies stand no chance with your blade!

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: This'll give those jerks on your old highschool track team a run for their money!

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: Inevitably, every adventurer will get in a sticky situation with a bad cut or break at least once in their career. This'll help put you on the mend and get back to adventuring!

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: It may not be the fastest strike out there, but it'll certainly do against the standard adventuring fare.

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: You think you saw this in a video of some kind once. It's certainly worth a try, in this world.

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: A must-have for any adventurers with an allergy to bee stings and similar natural poisons.

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: For those averse to bowery, a good set of javelins is the next-best thing. Fortunately, adventurers devised ways to quickly make a pair serviceable for their travels.

data.//: Adventurer technique
data.description: Adventuring tends to result in a good amount of small cuts and bruises that might not be life-threatening, but boy do they hurt like hell!

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: You must strike like a sparrow and attack before your enemy may react

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: Ever wanted to chop down a tree in a single strike? Now you can!

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: Much like a hornet's stinger stabs right through your skin, you must stab right through your enemies.

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: A technique for when you're on the move and you don't want to stop in place and cut your enemy down

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: You are a storm that is approaching, preparing to devastate your enemies.

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: Attacking your enemy in the same breath that you draw your sword is a recipe for efficient combat.

data.//: Blademaster technique
data.description: When your reflexes and your blade are what stands between you and death, you must make sure that both are razor-sharp.
A carefully folded raw skin harvested from an owlbear.  It still has the fur attached.  You can cure it for storage and tanning, or eat it if you're desperate enough.
data.name: raw owlbear pelt

data.description: A rolled up owlbear hide which has been scraped of extraneous hair and flesh and treated to prevent decay.  It could be tanned and transformed into usable fur pelts.
A small bolt of fur from an owlbear.  Can be used for VERY warm clothing.
A bone from a dragon!  Even on its own, these bones make an excellent material for weapons.  However, something tells you that the bones hide more secrets than just that.
A small shard of dragon bone, shaped almost like a shard of porcelain.
The great plates from behind a bulette's head have always been prized for use in shield and armor making.
data.name: bulette plate

data.description: A piece of demon spider exoskeleton.  It is light and very durable, and probably has some magical properties.
A large piece of demon spider exoskeleton, painstakingly cut from the corpse of an adult demon spider.  A plate of this size can be used to create armor plating.
data.name: demon chitin plate

data.//: Density 7.60g/cm³ ~ 1.9kg/250ml @ 1000g/unit ~ stack 2 and formed as a solid ingot so 100% of this
data.description: A lump of raw orichalcum.  Needs to be reformed into an ingot to be useful.

data.//: Density 7.60g/cm³ ~ 1.9kg/250ml @ 250g/unit ~ stack 8 but mishapen so only 50% of this
data.description: A sliver of orichalcum broken from a larger piece.  Needs to be reformed into an ingot to be useful.

data.//: Density the same as steel.
data.description: An ingot of orichalcum.  About 3 cm by 7 cm by 12 cm in size, ready to be used for various blacksmithing tasks.
data.name: orichalcum ingot

data.description: Elemental liquid mercury.  Known for its use in thermometers.
A lump of raw mithril.  Needs to be reformed into an ingot to be useful.

data.//: density of aluminum
data.description: An ingot of mithril.  About 3cm by 7cm by 12cm in size, ready to be used for various blacksmithing tasks.
data.name: mithril ingot

data.description: Mjölnir, the legendary hammer of Thor.  It is rumored to be able to level mountains with a single blow.  You feel the power of Asgard coursing through the hammer.
Gungnir, the spear of Odin.  It is rumored to be the perfect spear, perfectly hitting any target regardless of the wielder's strength or skill.  If feels like Odin's protecting you.

data.//: Extra-sharp because it is thus in mythos and also to compensate for lack of sick magic
data.description: Gram, the sword of Sigurd.  It is rumored to be the sword that slayed the legendary dragon, Fafnir.  Once said to have cleaved Regin's anvil in half, the edge is impeccable.
Laevateinn, the staff of Loki.  Said to have been plucked from the gates of Hel by Loki.  Imbued with a mysterious magic, the magic of the trickster god himself.

A variant of the combat knife that is made of orichalcum instead of steel.  Sharper and easier to maintain than steel while just as dense, this knife also has a thinner blade, which shaves off some weight.

A variant of the longsword that is made of orichalcum instead of steel.  Sharper and easier to maintain than steel while just as dense, this longsword also has a thinner blade, which shaves off some weight.
A fire axe made with orichalcum instead of steel.  This allows the axe to be just as effective as its steel counterpart at chopping, with less weight to tire the arms.

A variant of the longsword that is made of dragonbone.  This makes for a very powerful blade without sacrificing durability.  Even better than orichalcum, and you can sense that this isn't even its final form.

A variant of the battleaxe that is made of dragonbone.  This makes for a very powerful blade without sacrificing durability.  Even better than orichalcum, and you can sense that this isn't even its final form.

A variant of the qiang that is made of dragonbone.  This makes for a very powerful blade without sacrificing durability.  Even better than orichalcum, and you can sense that this isn't even its final form.

A variant of the tachi that is made of dragonbone.  This makes for a very powerful blade without sacrificing durability.  Even better than orichalcum, and you can sense that this isn't even its final form.

An impressively ornate golden warhammer with a sapphire and a ruby embedded within.  The engraved words on it appear to be in some strange mix of ancient French and German.  You can sense a faint magic aura being emitted by it, and picking up the weapon gives you the distinct impression that there's even more power within laying dormant.  If only you could harness that power and awaken it once more…

data.//: Roughly +25% acid damage
data.description: A variant of the longsword that is made of dragonbone, now with the acidic ire of a black dragon imbued within.

data.//: Roughly +25% acid damage
data.description: A variant of the battleaxe that is made of dragonbone, now with the acidic ire of a black dragon imbued within.

data.//: Roughly +25% acid damage
data.description: A variant of the qiang that is made of dragonbone, now with the acidic ire of a black dragon imbued within.

data.//: Roughly +25% acid damage
data.description: A variant of the tachi that is made of dragonbone, now with the acidic ire of a black dragon imbued within.

data.//: A heavier version of the standard shillelagh (from melee.json) with a different description to match the lizardfolk lore.  Not craftable, but wieldable if discovered.
data.description: A stout knotty club with a large knob at the top.  While it's very heavy, it's a very effective weapon in the hands of a strong opponent.
data.name: greatclub

data.description: A wooden melee weapon with a hand-forged steel forked spearhead attached to the end.  It can be used for stabbing opponents either in close-range or as a thrown weapon, and in the right hands can also readily disarm opponents.
data.name: wood trident

data.//: A barbed version of the standard javelin (from spears_and_polearms.json) with a different description to match the lizardfolk lore.  Not craftable, but wieldable if discovered.
data.description: This weapon measures about 3 feet in length and is fletched like an arrow for better accuracy.  The business end of the javelin has wicked-looking barbs which could cause significant bleeding.
Fake gun that fires barbed javelins.
A very concentrated form of mana potion.  You aren't quite sure of the effects this will have…
data.name: concentrated mana serum

data.description: A remarkably accurate effigy of an undead human, including pieces of bone and organs.  Necromantic magic delays immediate rot, but it won't last forever.  Piercing it with the attached needle could compel it to serve you.
data.name: zombie voodoo doll

data.description: A remarkably accurate effigy of an undead human covered with bone, including pieces of organs.  Necromantic magic delays immediate rot, but it won't last forever.  Piercing it with the attached needle could compel it to serve you.
data.name: ossified voodoo doll

data.description: A remarkably accurate effigy of an undead cougar, complete with fur, bones, and organs.  Necromantic magic delays immediate rot, but it won't last forever.  Piercing it with the attached needle could compel it to serve you.
data.name: cougar voodoo doll

data.description: A classic, this wand shoots fireballs without fail.  A more skilled Kelvinist could cast them more efficiently, though.
A classic, this wand shoots magic missiles without fail.  A more skilled Magus could cast them more efficiently, though.
OBSOLETE ITEM!  Only exists for save integrity
You can't buy these, so you need to save them until the last boss!  Actually, don't even use them there!
This is a potion of Cat's Grace.  It will increase your dexterity for 10 minutes.
This is a potion of Ogre's Strength.  It will increase your strength for 10 minutes.
This is a potion of Eagle's Sight.  It will increase your perception for 10 minutes.
This is a potion of Fox's Cunning.  It will increase your intelligence for 10 minutes.
This foul-smelling liquid simulates undead regeneration by accelerating your heart to dangerous levels.  Drinking this in danger or at critical condition may be lethal.

This foul-smelling liquid simulates undead regeneration by accelerating your heart to dangerous levels.  Drinking this in danger or at critical condition may be lethal.  Improved infusion techniques lessen the strain of the process.

This book details black dragons: The most evil of dragons, who live in ruins generally in swamps.  Immune to acid and breathe acid.  The book also details how to prepare its hide and craft various armors that make use of some of its acid resistance.

name.str_pl: copies of Black Dragons: Swamp Ruins

data.description: A paperback tome for the art of liquid magic, alcohol not included.

name.str_pl: copies of A Beginner's Guide to Alchemy

data.description: A paperback tome for the art of binding undead creatures' souls to dolls, along with emulating their healing factor.

name.str_pl: copies of A Soulbinder's Guide to Necromancy

data.description: A paperback tome for the art of combining modern technology with magic.  There is a disclaimer on the back: `Cannith Industries bears no responsibility for malfunctions or accidents for any products mentioned herein`.
An ornate book which appears to be written in Norse runes.  Based on the detailed illustrations, it appears to contain information about crafting numerous weapons used by various Gods.

name.str: The Weapons of Asgard and Beyond
name.str_pl: copies of The Weapons of Asgard and Beyond

data.description: A leatherbound book with an embossed cauldron on the cover.  Inside it describes ways to purify food magically.
A book with a brass coverplate.  It professes to teach one how to make magical metals such as Orichalcum.  It is dry reading even for an alchemical tome.
A leatherbound book with a picture of a shield holding back dragonfire on the cover.  There are many ways to turn monster skins and hides into protective equipment inside.

name.str_pl: copies of Protection from Magical Beasts

data.description: A hefty textbook on the theory and practice of magically strengthening weapons and tools.

A small set of research papers written on what looks to be parchment from the 1800s regarding the creation of bulette-pearl bullets.  The papers go over the theoretical creation of a satchel that would slowly produce bulette ammo over time, and the author is listed as… Nikola Tesla?!?

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: A proper wizard is always prepared, crystallize your mana for the future!

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: The darkness holds no secrets for the arcane.  Adjust your sight to see in perfect darkness!

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: The light can not interact with you unless you want it to.  Become invisible!

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: A magical aura distorts light around your body, making it easier to dodge enemy attacks.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: Allows you to swap places with a previously existing holographic image of yourself.  If the universe itself can't tell you apart, who could?

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: Evil has become pervasive throughout the world.  Let your power be the light that shines in the darkness!

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: You channel your life force itself into your spiritual energy.  You spend hp to regain mana.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: With an intense ritual that resembles crossfit, you manage to put some of your pain at bay.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: An ethereal-looking zombie rises from the depths of the earth to fight for you.  You may be able to summon more with a higher level in this spell.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: A ghostly skeleton rises from the depths of the earth to fight for you.  You may be able to summon more with a higher level in this spell.
Summons a floating disk that is sworn to carry your burdens.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: A decrepit looking large cat rises from the depths of the earth to fight for you.  You may be able to summon more with a higher level in this spell.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Heals a little bit of damage on the target.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Evens out damage among your limbs.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This spell extrudes a long nasty whiplike tentacle of sharp bones and oozing acid from your body, it has a long reach attack and vicious damage.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: A spell that warps your body in alien ways to increase your physical abilities and strength.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: When cast, the mage opens his mouth and sprays acid in a wide cone to dissolve his foes into goo.  Just imagine what he'll do with the goo.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This spell grows a large pouch out of your skin on your back, allowing you to store your gear in it.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This spell creates a long shaft of bone with a wicked point and blades along its length.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: You always wanted to fire energy beams like in the animes you watched as a kid.  Now you can!

data.//: Classless spell1
data.description: Creates a magical light.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: Blind enemies for a short time with a sudden, dazzling light.  Higher levels deal slightly higher damage.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: A mass of spectral hands emerge from the ground, slowing everything in range.  Higher levels allow a bigger AoE, and longer effect.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: Encases your whole body in a magical aura that protects you from the environment.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: This spell causes roots and vines to burst forth from the ground and grab your foes, slowing them and doing a small amount of damage as they dig in.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: This spell causes roots to spear out the ground and stab into your foes in an arc, impaling them.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: This spell creates a projectile of hardwood that shoots forth from the caster's hand at high speed to stab into an enemy.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: This spell conjures a magical wooden recurve bow that fires endless arrows for as long as it lasts.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: Your connection to living things allows you to go into a magical trance.  This allows you to recover fatige quickly in exchange for mana.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: Are you the crazy cat lady?

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Encases your arms and hands in a sheath of magical stone, you can punch and defend yourself with it in melee combat.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Focusing mana into your leg, you stomp your foot and send out a shockwave, knocking enemies around you onto the ground.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: You focus on the stones beneath you and draw from their agelessness.  Your mana is converted to stamina.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: This spell projects a wide spray of sharp metal shards, cutting into your foes and friends alike.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: This spell projects a piercing rod of conjured iron at those that dare oppose you.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Creates an omnidirectional spray of razor sharp metal shards all around you.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Fires a conjured stone projectile at high velocity.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Causes an intense heat at the location, damaging the target.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Summons a small flame that does not burn you, but you can use it to light things on fire.  It seems to need you to have some intent to light things on fire, because you are able to put it in your pocket with no issue.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Causes jagged icicles to form in the air above the target, falling and damaging it.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: You hurl a pea-sized glowing orb that when reaches its target or an obstacle produces a pressure-less blast of searing heat.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: You blast a cone of frigid air toward the target.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: You're pretty sure you saw this in a game somewhere.  You fire a short-range cone of fire.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: You're pretty sure you saw this in a game somewhere.  You fire a short-range cone of ice and cold.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Freezes the touched target with intense cold.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Encases your feet in a magical coating of ice, allowing you to glide along smooth surfaces faster.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: You project a glowing white crystal of ice and it explodes on impact into a blossom of shattering cold.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Creates a magical shield of ice on your arm, you can defend yourself with it in melee combat and use it to bash.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Covers you in a thin layer of magical ice to protect you from harm.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: I cast Magic Missile at the darkness!

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: Teleports you in a random direction a short distance.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: Summons a well of gravity with the epicenter at the location.  Deals bashing damage to all creatures in the affected area.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: A blast of concentrated magical power that obliterates a large area.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: A bolt of magical power that only damages your foes.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: This spell gives you an enormous boost of speed lasting a short period of time.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: A beam of focused magical power that damages any foes in its path.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: Teleports you in a random direction a medium distance, to help escape your foes in dangerous situations.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: You become more graceful, agile, and coordinated.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: You gain the perception of an eagle.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: You gain the strength of an ogre.

data.//: Magus spell
data.description: You become wily like a fox.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: A short-ranged fan of electricity shoots from your fingers.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: The goto spell for many Stormshapers, this iconic spell does just what you expect: you shoot lightning from your fingertips.  However, this lightning is more directed than most lightning, and travels in a line through most non-solid targets.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: A powerful blast of wind slams into anything in front of your outstretched hand.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: A magical wind pushes you forward as you move, easing your movements and increasing speed.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: Creates a crackling magical warhammer full of lightning to smite your foes with, and of course, smash things to bits!

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: A spell of blessing that gives you energy and boosts your abilities.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This blade of light will cut through any evil it makes contact with!

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: Evil will not make it through your defenses if your faith is strong enough!

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: Creates a magical lamp.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: You have found a way to convert your spiritual energy into power you can use for your bionics.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This spell creates a very short range bolt of electricity to shock your foes.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This spell manipulates some quantum something or other to tunnel you through a short distance of space, and even matter, unfortunately there's that whole uncertainty thing as to where you come out.  It leaves you a little dazed on the other side as you reorient yourself.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This spell stimulates the synapses in your brain beyond normal processing speeds, giving you a large boost in mental processing capability, including enhancing your reflexes, speed, and raw intellectual power.  Use responsibly!

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: You concentrate and release a focused beam of photons at a target, also known as a laser.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This spell conjures flying animated blades that will cut your enemies down to size.  Into small pieces that is.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: This spell manipulates light into barely tangible duplicates of a living being, a magical hologram in short.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: You fire a small concentrated ball of lightning at the target.  The electricity diffuses quickly, so it doesn't do much damage, but you're able to fire off several quick ones in a row.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: You use the power of your own blood to imbue necrotic energy into your gaze, damaging the target you look at.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: You summon a gift of the earth which will purify water.  Greater levels yield greater numbers of seeds.

data.//: Technomancer spell
data.description: You overcharge your internal batteries to send a semi-directed beam from your face.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: You tear up the ground beneath you to fire a lava bomb: a globe of lava surrounded by hot, solid rock.  It shatters upon impact, spraying shards of rock and lava everywhere.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: This scroll details how a spell called 'Lightning Blast' which is commonly used among Stormshapers can be altered to become much more powerful, at a much higher mana cost.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: Through giving of one's own life force, you restore withered and barren plant life nearby.  What remains will need time to regrow its full strength.

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: Channels some of the user's own life force into healing energy, for the sake of ones allies.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Envelops your entire body in armor formed from living rock, encumbering yet protective.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: Drawing upon the surrounding earth, you form a pillar of solid rock.  Experience will make the task easier, and less disruptive to the surrounding area.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Spits a warped needle of sinew and bone, carrying with it a sting that slows your victim.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Projects a spray of acrid blood and gore all around you, growing to ensnare your prey in in a field of twitching poisonous tendrils.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Turns your biological mastery inwards, medically enhancing your flesh.  Rather than strength of healing, it staves off blood loss and purges wounds before they can turn septic, at the cost of increased hunger and thirst.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: By manipulating the charge in the air, you can conjure a sharp snap of lightning over a wide area.  While its destructive potential is a far cry from natural lightning, the light and thunderclap produced will leave your foes reeling.

data.//: Animist spell
data.description: Summons ghostly foxfire worked from living marsh vapor, to lead your enemies astray.  With more experience, this spell can conjure multiple ghost lights.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: Draws forth a broad wall of thick fog.  While the sudden force of air pressure will floor any enemies caught in it, the conjuration is otherwise harmless.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: Allows you to condense water from the air around you.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: Allows you to condense clean water from the air around you.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Produces usable Hydrochloric Acid for you.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: You can tell this is an authentic magic scroll by all the cursive writing.  It does make it a bit hard to read, though…

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: This scroll details how a spell called 'Fireball' which is commonly used among Kelvinists can be altered to become much more powerful, at a much higher mana cost.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: This scroll details how a spell called 'Hoary Blast' which is commonly used among Kelvinists can be altered to become much more powerful, at a much higher mana cost.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: This scroll details how to tear up the ground beneath you to throw a medium boulder.

data.//: Earthshaper spell
data.description: This scroll contains a powerful spell to call down a meteor from high in the sky.  With this cataclysm, maybe another dinosaur-killer would be a good thing.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This scroll details how to throw acid at someone.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This scroll contains details on how to shape acid into a compressed spherical shape.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: This scroll details how a spell called 'Acid Bomb' can be altered to become much more powerful, at a much higher mana cost.

data.//: Biomancer spell
data.description: Creating all that acid is no good if you can't protect yourself from your own spells.

data.//: Classless spell
data.description: In this catastrophe, it's very tempting to be able to say 'screeeewwwwww the nether'.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Your enemies may be as cold as ice, but you shouldn't have to be.

data.//: Kelvinist spell
data.description: Your enemies may want you to die in a fire, but you'd rather not.

data.//: Stormshaper spell
data.description: With this spell, you will no-longer be thunderstruck by pesky bolts of electricity.
static std::string description( spell sp ) const;

name.str: A Technomancer's Guide to Debugging C:DDA
name.str_pl: copies of A Technomancer's Guide to Debugging C:DDA

data.//: 2 Magus, 1 classless spell
data.description: Looks just like a typical pamphlet claiming to teach people magic.  Yet, for some reason you can't quite put your finger on, you get the feeling that there's a little more truth than usual to this one…

name.str_pl: copies of A Beginner's Guide to Magic

data.//: 1 Magus, 1 Biomancer, 1, Kelvinist, 1 Stormshaper, 1 classless spell
data.description: This appears to be the spell version of a guide for what things to take with you when backpacking.  It's a little bulky, but will certainly prove useful.

name.str_pl: copies of Wizarding Guide to Backpacking

data.//: 5 Kelvinist spells
data.description: This charred husk of a book still contains many ways to light things aflame.

data.//: 1 Magus, 1 biomancer, 2 kelvinist spells
data.description: This details complex diagrams, rituals, and choreography that describes various spells.

name.str_pl: copies of A Treatise on Magical Elements

data.//: 1 technomancer, 1 biomancer, 1 classless spells
data.description: This appears to mostly be a religious text, but it does have some notes on healing.

name.str_pl: copies of Introduction to the Divine

data.//: 3 animist spells. Like it SHOULD be.
data.description: Despite the title, this seems to be written in Middle English.  A little obtuse, but you can make out most of the words well enough.

name.str: The Paladin's Guide to Modern Spellcasting
name.str_pl: copies of The Paladin's Guide to Modern Spellcasting

data.//: 6 Kelvinist spells
data.description: This slim book almost seems to be made from ice, it's cold to the touch.

data.//: 8 Stormshaper spells
data.description: A large book embossed with crossed lightning bolts and storm clouds, it tingles to the touch.

name.str: The Tome of The Oncoming Storm
name.str_pl: copies of The Tome of The Oncoming Storm

data.//: 1 technomancer, 1 earthshaper, 1 classless spell
data.description: A small composition notebook, containing spells created by a novice magician.

data.//: 3 technomancer, 4 classless spell
data.description: A small white book, it subtly amplifies the ambient light around it.

name.str_pl: copies of Of Light and Falsehoods

data.//: 7 Biomancer spells
data.description: A small tome, seemingly covered in tanned human skin.

name.str_pl: copies of The Tome of Flesh

data.//: 4 Druid spells
data.description: A bark covered book.

name.str_pl: copies of The Book of Trees

data.//: 1 technomancer, 2 animist, 1 druid, 1 earthshaper spell
data.description: This book details spells that use your mana to recover various physiological effects.

name.str: The Utility of Mana as an Energy Source
name.str_pl: copies of The Utility of Mana as an Energy Source

data.//: 3 Magus spells
data.description: Your standard wizardy looking spellbook, filled with Magus combat spells.  You sure lucked out!

name.str: The Tome of The Battle Mage
name.str_pl: copies of The Tome of The Battle Mage

data.//: 4 earthshaper spells
data.description: This large dusty spellbook seems perpetually, well, dusty.  It contains the power of the earth.

name.str: The Tome of the Hollow Earth
name.str_pl: copies of The Tome of the Hollow Earth

data.//: 3 Magus spells
data.description: This small lightweight book seems to almost not entirely exist, let's say it 97% does.  It contains Magus spells focused on movement.

name.str_pl: copies of The Tome of Magical Movement

data.//: Druid spell
data.description: This looks like someone was designing a new spell, but spilled a mug of coffee on it and crumpled it up in anger.  You can tell that it will definitely cast something, but you can't be sure that it will work very well.

data.//: 3 Animist spells
data.description: This book details various ways of summoning an undead minion to fight for you.  They all appear to disappear after a short time, crumbling to dust.

name.str_pl: copies of Necromantic Minions for Dummies

data.//: 3 Technomancer spells
data.description: This thick manual instructs the spellcaster on manipulating and empowering various forms of matter and energy.

data.//: 2 Technomancer spells
data.description: This colorful guide, full of diagrams and cartoons, teaches a couple of very basic Technomancy spells for the not-so-bright pupils.

name.str_pl: copies of Complete Idiot's Guide to Technomancy

data.//: 2 Technomancer spells
data.description: This lab reference material book is thick and overflowing with information on combining magic with EM radiation.

name.str_pl: copies of Technomancy and the Electromagnetic Spectrum

data.//: 1 classless spell
data.description: This book outlines in great detail how time and space are wibbly-wobbly and non-Euclidean.  It also appears to have a dozen different coordinate systems that it uses nearly interchangeably, which makes it hard to follow.  There's lots of jargon, but with intense study you can probably learn a thing or two about portals.

name.str: Geospatial Systems: The Lie Of Linearity
name.str_pl: copies of Geospatial Systems: The Lie Of Linearity

data.//: 4 Magus spells
data.description: The Human is the only creature that seeks to improve himself.  This study examines different spells that can heighten various senses temporarily, in hopes to discover a more permanent solution.

name.str_pl: copies of Transcendence of the Human Condition

data.//: 2 basic technomancer spells
data.description: A fairly simplistic looking technomancer's spellbook containing just a couple simple technomancy spells.

name.str_pl: copies of The Novice Technomancer's Spellbook

data.//: 2 basic stormshaper spells
data.description: A fairly simplistic looking stormshaper's spellbook containing just a couple simple stormshaping spells.

name.str_pl: copies of The Novice Stormshaper's Spellbook

data.//: 2 basic earthshaper spells
data.description: A fairly simplistic looking earthshaper's spellbook containing just a couple simple earthshaping spells.

name.str_pl: copies of The Novice Earthshaper's Spellbook

data.//: 4 basic kelvinist spells: 2 ice and 2 fire
data.description: A fairly simplistic looking kelvinist's spellbook containing just a couple simple spells from both fire and ice.

name.str_pl: copies of The Novice Kelvinist's Spellbook

data.//: I went ahead and gave this a level of 2 for when magical mutagens become a thing as I figured dragonblood for instance should need different tools than making alpha mutagen.
data.description: This cauldron made of demon spider chitin seems to absorb the light.  It will hold 16 liters of material and will absorb poisons from it.  It may have other properties that require discovery.
This is a portable version of the charcoal forge that is magically enhanced and fortified with demon spider chitin in order to be able to resmelt magical metals into their workable ingot form.
Some alchemical mortar, ready to be used in building projects expecting temperatures on par with dragonbreath.
This bracelet has runes engraved on it.  You sense a faint air of mysticism when you look at it.  It would be useful for imbuing mana into material.
This bracelet has runes engraved on it.  You sense a faint air of mysticism when you look at it.  It would be useful for imbuing mana into material.
A wooden band with copper trimmings to be worn on the head.  Touching your temples with it on makes you feel very calm.
A folding frame made of orichalcum pipes.  Not as light as aluminum, but significantly sturdier.
data.name: foldable orichalcum frame

data.description: A frame made of orichalcum.  Significantly sturdier than steel, but also much more expensive.
data.name: orichalcum frame

data.description: Your skill in the arcane.  Represents magic theory and all that entails.  A higher skill increases how quickly you can learn spells, and decreases their spell failure chance.  You learn this skill by studying books or spells.

data.hit_dmg_u: The %1$s impales your %2$s with its trident!
data.no_dmg_msg_npc: The %1$s tries to impale <npcname>'s %2$s with its trident, but fails to penetrate their armor!
data.no_dmg_msg_u: The %1$s tries to impale your %2$s with its trident, but fails to penetrate your armor!

data.hit_dmg_u: The %1$s crushes your %2$s with its greatclub!
data.no_dmg_msg_npc: The %1$s tries to crush <npcname>'s %2$s with its greatclub, but swings wide and stumbles.
data.no_dmg_msg_u: The %1$s tries to crush your %2$s with its greatclub, but swings wide and stumbles.

data.//: A lizard humanoid race, they are allies and servants of the black dragons.
data.name: GROUP_LIZARDFOLK

data.//: Cheap golems used to defend the average wizard's tower.
data.name: GROUP_TOWER_GOLEM

data.description: An image made from light, nearly identical to the real deal.
data.name: hologram

data.description: A conjured glowing longsword that darts and dodges around, slicing and cutting your foes into small pieces.
data.name: animated blade

data.description: A summoned zombie.  Slightly more intelligent than its wild cousins.
data.name: Summoned Zombie

data.description: A summoned skeleton.  Slightly more intelligent than its wild cousins.  Seems like it somehow enjoys puns.
data.name: Summoned Skeleton

data.description: A summoned zombie cougar.  Slightly more intelligent than its wild cousins.
data.name: Summoned Decayed Pouncer

data.//: separate harvest entry for future special alchemical items

data.description: Despite it being the size of a small dog, you can tell this is a very young spider.  Its red color is why you gave it this name; you have never seen this creature before the Cataclysm.  It is quick, and its large fangs drip with venom.
data.name: demon spiderling

data.//: monster can't be any bigger because of limits of volume on tiles.  if there is a way designed around this, it should be about 3500 L
data.description: This spider is the size of a car.  Its huge compound eyes seem to be infinite pools of blackness that seem to suck the light out of the air.  Its maroon carapace is studded with wicked-looking spikes that drip with some kind of viscious black liquid that sizzles when it touches the ground.
data.name: demon spider

data.description: This gigantic spider is the size of a moving van: you have no idea how it manages to stay together, much less move with that bulk.  Its abdomen is huge and swollen-looking, and an evil intelligence burns in its eyes even as magic crackles around its chitinous barbs.
data.name: demon spider queen

data.description: This is a small black dragon, less than five years old.  Its scales are glossy, and its horns barely peek out of its head.  Even from one so young, you see the glint of sadism in its eyes.
data.name: black dragon wyrmling

data.//: should be roughly 4000 L, as that's the size of a large cow.
data.description: This black dragon appears to still be in the early stages of life.  Its eyes have just started to sink in its sockets, and its curved, segmented horns have just begun to darken at the tips.  You can tell just by looking at it, this creature is evil to its very core.  Even though this dragon is not fully grown, it is the size of a full-grown bull.
data.name: young black dragon

data.//: If it were possible, the adult would be about double the size of a young version or so.
data.//2: Large means powerful, but it does not mean fast.
data.description: A black-scaled monstrosity with deep-set eye sockets glowing green with evil.  Its face and skull appear skeletal, and acid drips from its dagger-like jaws.
data.name: adult black dragon

data.//: We haven't demihuman, so I went with the Troll solution of just going human.
data.description: A short, mischievous green humanoid covered in dirty, slightly-worn clothing.  Brandishing a cudgel and with a certain grin on its face, you can tell that it loves causing trouble and likely won't back down from a fight.
data.name: Goblin

data.description: A short green humanoid who slings rocks just about as well as it slings insults.  They have quite a penchant for taunting, and they're dodgier in more ways than one.

special_attacks.description: The goblin slings a rock at you!

data.description: An ugly bastard of a goblin who asserted his rule over the rest through liberal application of violence and a little extra cunning.  He's much tougher, and he brandishes a weapon that has faint tinges of magic.
A large, humanoid golem made from clay.  Its proportions are off and it seems fragile.
data.name: clay golem

data.description: Traditionally, making a golem is a months-long process involving hand tools and precision craftsmanship.  A stone golem is as much a work of art as it is a magical device.  The advent of 3D printing made it easy to get into the golem-making hobby, and plastic golems have soared in popularity.
A large, humanoid golem made from stone.  Its fists look similar to rockets.
data.name: stone golem

data.description: A large, humanoid golem made from iron.  Some sort of noxious gas seems to be seeping from its mouth.
data.name: iron golem

data.description: Traditionally, creating a golem is a long and arduous process, taking several months for a golem so large as this one.  However, the advent of modern materials has allowed for much simpler and quicker to make golems.  This golem appears to somehow still be very fresh, almost as if it had only been very recently poured, and it can likely recover from wounds rather quickly

Traditionally, creating a golem is a long and arduous process, taking several months for a golem so large as this one.  However, the advent of modern materials has allowed for much simpler and quicker to make golems.  This golem appears to be partially, but not fully, cured.  As such, it can likely recover from small injuries given some time.

Traditionally, creating a golem is a long and arduous process, taking several months for a golem so large as this one.  However, the advent of modern materials has allowed for much simpler and quicker to make golems.  This golem appears to be fully cured, meaning it'll be almost like stone.  You can't quite tell whether that's just a pattern on it, or if it's something more sinister…
A large, humanoid golem made from orichalcum.  It's arms are fashioned into sharp blades.
data.name: orichalcum golem

data.description: A large, humanoid golem made from mithril.  This golem is practically invulnerable.  Luckily, it is less aggressive
data.name: mithril golem

data.description: A tall, powerful, reptilian humanoid with a muscular tail whose skin is covered in dark gray-green scales.  They are tribal and tend to be found in caves and near water, especially in areas inhabited by dragons and wyrms.  They aren't particularly hostile, though they don't care for outsiders and are highly dangerous when provoked.  While they usually prefer to fight with their greatclubs, they are equally ferocious with their sharp teeth and claws.
data.name: lizardfolk warrior

data.description: The hunter is a smaller lizardfolk than a warrior, but equally as deadly, with their lithe figures and accurate javelin throws.
data.name: lizardfolk hunter

special_attacks.description: The hunter hurls a barbed javelin at you!

data.description: Lizardfolk are very intelligent and cunning, but magical ability is a rare quality.  Shamans are chosen from the tribe during childhood, when magical abilities mark the fate of the young tribesman.  Not much is known about the initiation ritual they must undergo, but few survive the experience.  Shamans are druidic spellcasters that can use the forces of nature to battle enemies, as well as summoning assistance when needed.
data.name: lizardfolk shaman

data.description: Among the lizardfolk, ambition is a rare quality.  Chieftans earn their place by exhibiting unusually high levels of ambition, often mistaken by outsiders as excessive, brutal violence.  This chief is the largest and strongest member of its tribe and carries a fierce trident to compliment its teeth and claws.
data.name: lizardfolk chieftan

data.//: A copy of the standard mon_gator (from reptile_amphibian.json) with a different description to match the lizardfolk lore.  Lizardfolk Shamans are able to shapeshift into crocodile form.
data.description: A once-and-future lizardfolk shaman, this large crocodile no longer has any hint of any humanoid characteristics and looks very, very dangerous.
data.name: crocodile

data.description: The horrible owlbear is probably the result of genetic experimentation by some insane wizard.  These creatures inhabit the tangled forest regions of every temperate climate, as well as subterranean labyrinths.  They are even more easily angered than normal bears, so it's best to keep a distance.  Something tells you this isn't exactly a very old species, based on only recently seeing them.
data.name: owlbear

data.description: Writhing, sticky, black sludge undulates across the ground.  A faint sizzling sound comes from the ground beneath it as it lurches toward you.
data.name: black pudding

special_attacks.monster_message: The black pudding burns %3$s with acid!

data.description: A large baleful eye peers out from the darkness, its gleam hinting at a weird intelligence and unnerving malevolence.  The eye oozes some pinkish liquid, and the weirdly humanoid figure is covered in sharp blue-black triangular plates.
data.name: krabgek

data.description: The bulette (or landshark) was the result of a mad wizard's experimental cross breeding of a snapping turtle and armadillo with infusions of demons' ichor.  They range temperate climates feeding on horses, men, and most other flesh.  The stupid bulette is irascible and always hungry, and they fear nothing.
data.name: bulette

data.description: Will-o’-wisps can be yellow, white, green, or blue.  They are easily mistaken for lanterns, especially in the foggy marshes and swamps where they reside.
data.name: will-o-wisp

data.description: Monstrous, green-skinned humanoid.  Trolls are renowned for their thick hides and natural regenerative ability.
data.name: troll

data.description: This horrid flying creature looks like a cross between a large bat and oversized mosquito.
data.name: stirge

data.description: A shrieker is a human-sized mushroom that emits a piercing screech to drive off creatures that disturb it.
data.name: shrieker

data.description: A lemure resembles a molten mass of flesh with a vaguely humanoid head and torso.
data.name: lemure

data.//: We haven't demihuman, so I went with the Troll solution of just going human.
data.description: A big, badly behaved brutish humanoid.  Armed with a sword and possessing more than enough strength to use it to deadly effect, you don't want to be in the way of one when its angry.  It's also well armored, alongside a hide one might slightly exaggerate as being ironlike.  Generally less intelligent than goblins, but it's ill advised to mention that.
data.name: Orc Warrior

data.description: A big brute who wields a powerful bow.  Not as respected among orc society, but still very effective.  It won't hesitate to slam you with the bow if necessary, though.

special_attacks.description: The orc fires its bow at you!

data.description: As a deviation from the normal verdant skin of the orcs, the blood warriors are believed to be blessed by the gods of the orcs.  They certainly look the part, and from what you can tell their strength matches up with it.  You best be ready for a fight, because they'll certainly give you one.

dynamic_line.no: I must purge this land of its curse.  Will you help or hinder our mission?

responses.text: Can I do anything for you?

data.dynamic_line: Blessed be.  May you purge that which opposes the calm.

responses.text: Why don't you go somewhere else?

data.dynamic_line: I must purge this place before I can move on.

responses.text: Can I do anything for you?

data.dynamic_line: I'm busy, what is it?

responses.text: Why don't you go somewhere else?

data.dynamic_line: And leave my tower and all my research? I think not.

dynamic_line.no: Do you seek power as well?

responses.text: Can I do anything for you?

data.dynamic_line: Yes, yes… *electrical crackling* Isn't it beautiful?

responses.text: Why don't you go somewhere else?

data.dynamic_line: I must find more power before I can leave.

data.job_description: I'm a wandering debug tester for the arcane arts.
data.name: Mage Test

data.job_description: I'm an old Magus.  Get off my lawn!
data.name: Master Magus

data.job_description: I'm searching for more power.
data.name: Techno-student

data.job_description: I will purge this land of its curse.
data.name: Healer

data.description: The spellcrafters of old.  Hidden from the world until the cataclysm, they have their own agenda and care little for you or yours.
data.name: The Ancient Ones

data.description: A collection of those cursed by the cataclysm.  They have sworn to rid this world of its curse and will stop at nothing to accomplish their task.
data.name: The Grey Flame

dialogue.accepted: …What?  Oh you're still here.  Go find my book.
dialogue.advice: You want me to do your job for you?  Bah.  That apprentice said something about wanting to look around town, you might start there.  Oh, and it's called The Tome of The Battle Mage, you can read at least the title, can't you?
dialogue.describe: Where did I put that blasted…
dialogue.failure: Ugh, why am I cursed with useless people?
dialogue.offer: I seem to have misplaced my book, The Tome of The Battle Mage.  That worthless apprentice probably stole it.  Bring it to me.
dialogue.rejected: Just as useless as that apprentice…
dialogue.success: Finally.  Took you long enough.
dialogue.success_lie: Nonsense!  Useless!  Waste of my time!

dialogue.accepted: I don't care where it comes from so long as it's clean.
dialogue.advice: Electronic Stores might have what I need.  Or you could just cut it out of something.
dialogue.describe: More power… moar power… MOAR POWAA!
dialogue.failure: I must find more power, this setback is inconvenient.
dialogue.offer: I need more power.  Find me more power storage and I'll give you this book.
dialogue.rejected: You want more power too, don't you?
dialogue.success: Perfect.  More power… power…
dialogue.success_lie: I don't understand.

dialogue.accepted: Blessed be.  I shall observe your efforts and judge you as one of the many or one of the few.
dialogue.advice: The awakened congregate in towns and cities, the closer to the center the more you will find.
dialogue.describe: Will you answer the call?
dialogue.failure: Was the curse too strong for you?
dialogue.offer: This world has fallen to chaos and death.  Remove 50 of the cursed from this world; assist me in purging this curse and you shall be rewarded.
dialogue.rejected: You will not help purge this curse?  Perhaps you are a part of the curse…
dialogue.success: Blessed be.  You are one of the few.  We shall do great works together.
dialogue.success_lie: Deception is the realm of the cursed.  You disappoint me.

dialogue.accepted: Blessed be.  You are a true testament to the few.
dialogue.advice: The awakened stir in even the darkest of corners.  Seek them out and destroy them.
dialogue.describe: You have proven you are one of the few, will you stand with the few again?
dialogue.failure: The curse of this land infects that which does not seek to purge.
dialogue.offer: We must continue the purge.  Remove 150 more of the cursed from this land and you shall be blessed with greatness.
dialogue.rejected: I see.  Perhaps you will find your way back to us one day.
dialogue.success: Blessed be.  You are a valuable asset to our cause.  Perhaps you may even be our salvation.
dialogue.success_lie: You have come so far.  Only to fall.

data.//: old magus in the wizard tower.
possibly crazy techno kid
a priest of the grey flame

data.description: This bionic is obsolete!
OBSOLETE!  Please instead switch to the proper acid ward.
OBSOLETE!  And likely not even very good at that.

data.//: Obsolete, to be removed at some point in the future
data.description: OBSOLETE!  This spell creates an invisible aura to protect you poorly from acid.
You found a pamphlet with bright colors claiming you can be a Wizard, oddly serene with the world falling down around you.
data.name: Would-be Wizard

data.description: You have loved fire all of your life.  You have now discovered your inner fire, and want to exercise that upon the world.
data.name: Pyromaniac Kelvinist

data.description: The ancient circle of druids is gone with the Cataclysm.  Nature must thrive.
data.name: Druid

data.description: When the apocalypse struck you did everything you could to protect your parish faithful, but it appears that prayers were not enough.  Now that they are all dead, you should probably find something more tangible to protect you.
data.name: Priest

data.description: You were one of the maintainers of a Shinto shrine, performing rituals and sacred tasks.  You preferred it when only the spirits of the dead inhabited your shrine, and not their rotting corpses.
data.name: Kannushi

data.//: No knife, fire, or decent storage/armor.  Skill points are countered.
data.description: You spent much of your time prior to the apocalypse at the local mosque, studying the words of the Prophet and the Quran and guiding your community in prayer.  Back then they came from far and wide to listen to you, now they come to eat your brains.
You were celebrating with your flock in the temple when the Cataclysm struck.  You sure could use a messiah right now!
data.name: Rabbi

data.//: 1.5 pts skills, cutting implement, and plenty of storage, so lack of fire only goes so far.
data.description: You spent many years traveling the world, becoming wise and learned.  Normally, you can answer any question, but even you are not quite sure what to do about the ravenous undead.
data.name: Guru

data.//: Storage + 2 points in skills, - no knife or fire.
data.description: You devoted your life to spreading the good word; always on the road, traveling from town to town.  Now everything has gone to hell, you can't host your daily podcast, and the undead listening to your sermons don't seem particularly moved.
data.name: Preacher

data.description: You always had to hide your magic, as it was generally not an acceptable type of magic in the wizarding world, but with the Cataclysm you need to pull every trick out of the book.
data.name: Novice Necromancer

data.description: The son of a weatherman, you were always interested in the weather.  Recently you found it was possible to manipulate the weather yourself through arcane means!  Unfortunately you did not have long to enjoy your power, as events unfolded…
data.name: Novice Stormshaper

data.description: You always were tough in a fight.  Your coach managed to teach you a trick or two to make you a little tougher.
data.name: Novice Earthshaper

data.description: With the recent Cataclysm, the way you found to cheat on tests may have to find some other use.
data.name: Novice Technomancer

data.description: Even from a young age, you'd always felt drawn to the hot and cold.  Fire had always warmed your spirits, and every Winter you were praying for a snow day simply because you loved them so much, even as you got older.  It's only natural that you'd find yourself learning the magic to control these primal elements.
data.name: Novice Kelvinist

data.//: Balanced based on weight
Terrible yields on purpose
Poor yields on purpose
Slightly less than pure plastic to account for differences between resin and plastic, I suppose
Forging and water included for glass heat-tempering process
Splinters from stock
Dragon scales.  For when any color is interchangeable.
override of vanilla raw steak, includes purified and impure meat
Wooden swords usable for the Flamesword spell
100ml portions of combustible dusts usable for the Flamebreath spell
Weapon materials and 1000 energy from blood suitable for the Decaying Boneclub spell
Natural ingredients used to make a poultice
Sand and sand-like items
Natural ingredients used to make a poultice. The joke is that all of the possible active ingredients are poisonous.
Sticks and the like
Natural ingredients used to make a poultice. Pain relieving active ingredients.

data.description: You've been preaching your faith for a long time, but the recent events have begun to make you doubt it.  Wandering in your temple, you just found books that may restore your faith or shatter it completely.
data.name: Lost Faith

data.description: You have been an apprentice to a wizard for some time now, working on a prototype device that could perhaps be used to escape from the Cataclysm.  Something went wrong with the maiden voyage though, and your teacher teleported his insides into his outsides.  Now you have to figure out how to survive on your own.  At least he left his notebook…
data.name: The Wizard's Apprentice

data.description: You have been an apprentice to a wizard for some time now, you've saved for years for your dream vacation at a secluded wizard tower.  Your journey of self-discovery is interrupted by the Cataclysm.  Now you have to figure out how to survive on your own.
data.name: The Wizard's Vacation

data.fail_message: The earth here does not listen to your command to move.

terrain.message: More debris shifts out of the pit.
The earth moves out of the way for you.
The rocks here are ground into sand.
All the dust in the air here falls to the ground.

data.//: Furniture alteration has to be able to reasonably check for most intervening furniture and remove it.

terrain.message: The ground shakes, a section of unnaturally smooth stone wall rising up.

data.//: TODO: Update the birch and willow transformations if they ever make those trees behave consistent relative to blackjack oak and pine.

terrain.message: Life springs anew from the dead grass.

data.description: This tree looks like it has been burnt badly, but it is somehow still standing.
data.name: burnt tree

data.description: This is a large coccoon-like object that looks to be the vague shape of some creature.  You don't want to know how long it stayed alive while being sucked dry by these spiders.
data.name: burnt tree

data.description: This wall seems to be made up of a combination of webbing, wood splinters, detritus, and some kind of dark-colored resin.
data.name: webbing wall

data.description: It's dirt.  The ground here is infertile.  Could also be dug out for construction projects.
data.name: barren dirt

data.description: A tradition as old as magic, the Magus focuses on binding and shaping the energy of the universe to their will.
data.name: Magus

data.description: The animist tradition is a relatively new school of magical thought, formed through combination of many older ways that focus on harmony and connection to the natural world.  This does not mean that animists are passive: the natural world is a savage place.

Disciples of the great Archwizard Lord Kelvin.  Kelvinists focus their magic on manipulation and control of the temperature of their environment, leading to spectacularly powerful explosions or bone-chilling cold.
data.name: Kelvinist

data.description: Stormshapers follow ancient arcane disciplines of meditation and harmony with the winds and tides that shape the planet.  Through their deep connection to these forces, they can request powerful changes.
data.name: Stormshaper

data.description: Technomancers are the new breed of modern magician, blending their arcane might with their advanced knowledge of the fundamental nature of the universe.  They use technology to enhance their magic and vice versa.
data.name: Technomancer

data.description: Earthshapers have allowed their minds to sink deep within the stones and metals of the planet, and become one with its secrets.  To a master Earthshaper, spells can be as permanent as the stones they are created from, and time is measured in geological eras.
data.name: Earthshaper

data.description: The Biomancer focuses on manipulating and even absorbing flesh; their own, and that of other living or dead things.  Most other wizards find their powers gross and disturbing, but no one can question the potency of their abilities, and certainly not their adaptability to any situation.

Druids follow a wild tradition of allegiance and rebirth within the world of nature, especially the cycle of death and rebirth that is the plant world.  A powerful Druid is as much a part of that world as the human one.
data.name: Druid

data.description: Adventurers are the jack-of-all-trades of the physical realm, not specializing in any one aspect prominently due to the variety encountered in their journeys.
data.name: Adventurer

data.description: Blademasters have studied the art of the blade extensively, honing their ability to strike fast and strike true.  Now you can look like your favorite anime character as you slay Zombies.
data.name: Blademaster

data.iv_message: A crackle of power comes from within.
data.mutagen_message: Your ley lines surge with mana.
data.name: Manatouched

data.description: Magic is in you.  Magic is you.
Your internal ley lines have become much easier for you to control, resulting in you being able to naturally create crystallized mana.
Your hands glow with mana energy.  You can fire seeker bolts from your fingertips.
You no longer need to move your arms to cast spells, due to your ley lines becoming untethered from your arms.  Arm encumbrance no longer applies to spell failure chance.
You no longer need to use your voice to enforce your will upon the world.  Mouth encumbrance no longer applies to spell failure chance.
Your body is unnaturally weak.  -2 Strength.
Your body discards unusable mana as light and heat, making you glow softly.
This is the spell portion of the mana siphon series of mutations.  If you have this spell you probably debugged it in.
data.name: Mana Siphon

data.description: Violence excites your ley lines.  Whenever you hit an enemy in melee, you have a chance of regaining some mana.
