info.description: Ever thought that base-game mutations are way too body-horror and ugly for you?  Ever wished your character could become an anime catgirl?  This is the mod for you!  This mod replaces the vanilla mutation categories with anime-inspired ones that ought to be far cuter.  Note: currently not 1:1 on new to old mutation categories.
info.name: Monster Girls Mutations

data.iv_message: Your back arches as the mutagen takes hold.
data.mutagen_message: As you lap up the last of the mutagen, you wonder why...
data.name: Nekomimi

data.//: General note: animal-girl names are chosen for familiarity and simplicity
data.iv_message: As the mutagen hits you, your ears twitch and you stifle a yipe.
data.mutagen_message: You feel an urge to mark your territory.  But then it passes.
data.name: Inumimi

data.//: ~rBGH is a bovine growth hormone, unpopular with consumers
data.iv_message: You wonder if this is what rBGH feels like...
data.memorial_message: Stopped worrying and learned to love the cowbell.
data.mutagen_message: Your mind and body slow down.  You feel peaceful.
data.name: Ushimimi

data.iv_message: You feel yourself quite equipped for wilderness survival.
data.mutagen_message: You feel an urge to… patrol?  the forests?
data.name: Kumamimi

data.iv_message: You feel… small.  But comfortable.
data.mutagen_message: You feel a desire to curl up in a nice, warm pile of… shredded paper.
data.name: Nezumimi

data.iv_message: Mmm… the *special* venom.
data.memorial_message: Found a place in the web of life.
data.mutagen_message: You feel insidious.
data.name: Arachnae

data.iv_message: Your arms spasm in an oddly wavelike motion.
data.mutagen_message: Your body lightens and you long for the sky.
data.name: Harpy

data.iv_message: You inject some nutrients into your phloem.
data.mutagen_message: You feel much closer to nature.
data.name: Dryad

data.iv_message: This stuff takes you back.  Downright primordial!
data.junkie_message: Maybe if you drank enough, you'd become mutagen...
data.memorial_message: Gave up on rigid human norms.
data.mutagen_message: Your body loses all rigidity for a moment.
data.name: Slime

data.iv_message: You feel like you could live forever, just like the trees!
data.mutagen_message: You feel the woods calling to you.
data.name: Fey

data.iv_message: Your blood runs wild with mischief and merriment as the mutagen flows through it.
data.mutagen_message: You suddenly have an indescribable craving for chicken...
data.name: Kitsune

data.iv_message: You feel the most intense craving for carrots you've ever had...
data.mutagen_message: You feel like literally jumping for joy!
data.name: Usagimimi

data.iv_message: You hiss, left reeling from the strange sensations.
data.mutagen_message: You feel a slithering feeling.
data.name: Lamia

messages: You have a strange dream about snakes.
Your dreams give you a strange slithering feeling.
You have a strange dream about birds.
Your dreams give you a strange feathered feeling.
You have a strange dream about bears.
Your dreams give you a rough furry feeling.
You have a strange dream about cats.
Your dreams give you a sleek furry feeling.
You have a strange dream about wolves.
Your dreams give you a thick furry feeling.
You have a strange dream about cattle.
Your dreams give you a strange content, furry feeling.
You have a strange dream about plants.
Your dreams give you a strange plantlike feeling.
You have a strange dream about slime.
Your dreams give you a strange slimy feeling.
You have a strange dream about spiders.
Your dreams give you a strange webbed feeling.
You have a strange dream.
You feel a yearning…
You dream of a massive block of cheese bigger than you.
You dream of being cozy in a dark place.
You have a strange dream about foxes.
Your dreams give you a mischievous furry feeling.
You have a strange dream about bunnies.
Your dreams give you a joyful bouncy feeling.
You have a dream of moving across a field, yet you don't hear your footsteps…
While dreaming, you see a strangely serpentine reflection of yourself.
You have strange dreams of soaring through the sky.
In a dream, you see a curiously harpy-like reflection of yourself.
You dream of foraging in the woods… mouth-first?
Your dream-reflection seems to have a pair of bear ears on its head.
You easily bound from the street to a roof..oh, only a dream.
As you dream, your reflection appears to have some cat ears on its head.
You have a disturbing dream of someone invading your territory.
Your dream-self appears to have dog ears on its head.
You dream of grazing in an open field.
In a dream you catch a glimpse of a strangely cattle-like tail on yourself.
You have a confusing dream of growing in a garden.
You are confused by a plantlike image of yourself in a dream.
You have a strange dream of living in sludge.
In your dream you see an odd, slimy reflection of yourself.
You have a strange dream of spinning webs
In your dream you see a very spiderlike version of yourself.
You dream of a home in the forests.
You feel beautiful, and yet riven with worry…
You dream of… sneaking.
You dream of a cold winter night.  Your jacket is too big to put on.
You have a vivid dream of hunting in the woods.
You have a vivid dream of sneaking up to a chicken coop.
Whilst dreaming, you see yourself… but with a pair of fox ears on your head?
You have an vivid dream of yourself with a long, serpentine tail instead of legs.
Your dream-self seems so graceful, slithering along in their dexterous scaly form.
You have a vivid dream of returning to your cozy warren.
You have a vivid dream of eating a nice, big, orange carrot.  It looks bigger than you!
Whilst dreaming, you see yourself… but with a pair of large bunny ears on your head?
You have a realistic dream of flying south with your flock for the winter.
You are disturbed when your harpy-like dreams are more lifelike than reality.
Your dream of raiding a giant beehive has you licking your lips in anticipation.
In your dream, you stalk and kill a young wolf, using only your teeth and claws.
A warm, sunny spot high up where you can watch your prey.  What a great dream!
You dream of pursuing and killing a rat, for some reason.
You dream of tearing into a fresh steak.
You dream of finally finding the perfect place to make your den.
You terrifyingly dream of being led to a milking machine by a farmer.
You find it hard to wake from a vivid dream of grazing on a farm.
You have a confusing and scary dream of becoming a plant.
The transition from your lifelike dreams of living as a plant to reality shocks you.
Your vivid dream of living as a slime blob frightens you.
You find it hard to control your limbs after dreaming of amorphous blob life.
You vividly dream of living in a web and consuming insects.
Your dreams of turning into a half-spider frighten you.
NO!  You will not allow this corruption to prevail!
You see yourself reflected in the beauty of the forest.
You weave between the zombies' legs, too small for them to catch.  The gas station isn't far now, with all its soda and chips and- UGH, dream…
Once you finish your tasty dinner of seeds, you look around for your drink, but you already ate it.
You vividly dream of running away from a chicken coop, your prey held by the neck between your teeth.
You vividly dream of… a wedding altar?!?
You vividly dream of skipping away from a big, scary predator.
It's like your stamina never ends, you wish you had this much energy outside of the dream world!
You have a nostalgic dream of stumbling around clumsily on two legs instead of an elegant snake tail.
You dream of coiling around a loved one, keeping them wrapped up close for warmth.
You wonder if your nest will be good enough.
Your dream of soaring over the landscape becomes a nightmare when you find yourself with arms and a glider!
You wonder if you could find one of those 'salmon runs', or if they were just a legend…
Ah, the wolf-slaying dream again.  That's a good one…
Boing!  and you've pounced another yummy critter.
Your nightmare of sentient rats turns successful, as you grab their King and shake it apart!
You dream of the hunt, the feed, and your pack.
Oh, you should really patrol your territory again, maybe expand.
You dream of jumping the gate and leading your herd to freedom.
The herd moves along and you with them, finding greener pastures.
You dream of bees fighting over your sweet nectar.  Mmm.
How grand it would be to sink your roots deep into the soil as the seasons pass you by.
You dream of a gigantic knot of roots, beating like a heart.
You have a disturbing dream of termites chewing all over your body.
You dream of sharing your roots with a vast forest, all plants provided for as the canopy grows ever upwards.
A family of caterpillars munches away at your leaves.
Fire rages around you, licking at your bark and engulfing the saplings and bushes near your roots.  The once chatty forest is quiet in its wake.
You dream of communing with an ancient pine.  Trees are the true survivors of this world, it tells you.
A rather attractive triffid offers you a bouquet of zombie heads.  How thoughtful!
Your vivid dream of your pseudopods calcifying into rigid structures terrifies you.
Ah, the painting-the-planet dream again.  Maybe if you assimilated more…
You excitedly web up an interloper and prepare to feast… nope, dream.
Your dreams of having to live without a web frighten you.
You pant, terrified at the thought of that FUNGUS destroying your home!
You wish others could understand, and join your struggle…
You curl up some more in your nest.  Geez, shredded paper really *is* comfy.
You hear the sirens again, but this time you stay in your hole in the wall.  Nobody will think to look there!
You vividly dream of committing tax fraud: the ultimate trick!
You find yourself subconsciously moving your head from your normal pillow to your tail as you sleep.
You dream of sharing your love of mischief with a partner.
You dream of sticking your finger down the barrel of that mean ol' farmer's shotgun, just like a certain cartoon character.
Look at all those cute babies!  If their dreams are anything like yours, it's no wonder your wild cousins are so fecund.
You dream about farming your very own near-limitless supply of carrots.

data.description: A super-concentrated mutagen the color of amber.  You need a syringe to inject it… if you really want to?
data.name: Kitsune serum

data.description: The age of man has ended, the age of catgirls is upon us!  After becoming a neko, you've found yourself wanting to… open a bakery?
Humanity has gone from taming dogs to becoming them!  You've acquired a sudden desire to… become a witch?
Becoming so cow-like has rendered you unable to even think about eating meat, especially beef.  You occaisonally find yourself wishing you had a human pal to protect, and maybe more.
Some part of you is telling you to just go in a cave and sleep this whole cataclysm thing off.  But the rest of you knows very well that you need to use your newfound strength for good.
You initially found yourself worried about what others might think of you now… fortunately, they're very cheesed to meet you!
The spider part of you is perfectly happy with your substitution of zombies for flies, and so is your human side.  You've found yourself wanting to open an underground bakery after this is all over.

The Wright Brothers **wish** they could have flown like you do.  The zombies stand no chance, now that you can swoop down from above!  Part of you wishes you could build a house on a floating sky island, though…

You've found yourself enjoying and communing with nature even more since you became so intertwined with it and the nature talks back.  Once this is all over and natural order has been restored, you'll *have* to start a conservationist group.

Your anything-but-newtonian body is soo bendy and stretchy!  It gives you plenty of mischevious ideas of what to do with them later… but for now, you'll have to settle for having fun returning those zombies to their grave.

You've found yourself with an incredible craving for lembas, as well as a strong desire to nock an arrow to a bow.  The trees speak to you, and you speak back.  In the darkest hour of mankind, the fae shall bring the light!

While you may not have gained the magical powers of the japanese fox spirits, you embody their mischievous nature perfectly.  Perhaps one day, you'll find that special partner-in-crime to live up to the other reputation Kitsunes have.

Those playboys hussies are just a bunch of posers, here's a REAL bunnygirl!  Those zombies are practically tortoises compared to you now, and you look stunning while doing it!  Something tells you it's gonna be a challenge to find a partner that can keep up with you…
You have to put in a lot of care to keep your scales smooth and shiny, but it's worth it.  All you need now is a nice warm rock to bask on, or someone to coil around for warmth…

data.description: This wriggling nodule of resin and flesh appears to be secreting a pungent fluid.  You'd probably best feed it into the bioblaster.
Your very own Project Excalibur.  Better get to defending America with it.

data.//: sci-fantasy extradimensional gadget = pricey
data.//2: because nobody would have that amount after the world ends, it's worth $1000 in barter
data.description: A sleek, unfathomably-complicated machine covered in dozens of blinking lights, worn on the back by sturdy faux-leather straps.  An electrode dangles from the back, attaching to your forehead.  How it operates without annihilating spacetime isn't quite clear, but a localized portal allows things to be stored in an extradimensional space.
A lightweight armor vest made of pieces of titanium sewn together, with cloth padding for comfort.  Brittle against blunt force, but highly resistant to cuts and corrosion.

A, when activated, will create an holographic decoy of its wearer.  Powered by an experimental n-space energy generator, it slowly recharges itself for free, probably by syphoning excess energy from some unknown hyperdimensional space.
The vantablack cloak of sentinel-lx hangs around ones shoulders as a solid, unnatural shadow.  Made from woven graphene, its lightweight and resistant, but cannot be repaired

Personal portable charging system consisting of an array of quantum solar panels neatly folded in a form of a large backpack.  It can be worn as one, and has an integrated cable to plug it into a cable charger system.  Cutting edge technology.
Unfolded array of portable quantum solar panels ready to push some power into an active cable charger system.

data.//: This is well within the pricing structure I found for ballistic vest, shins, and LBE.  LEO gear ain't cheap.
data.description: An extra large suit of black bulletproof armor with lots of pockets.  The word SWAT is emblazoned across the back.  Specifically designed for Uplifted officers such as Mastodons.

data.//: Based on US Army SPCS
data.description: Oversized ballistic armor without any armor inserts.  The soft armor plate carrier is still protective but it won't stop high energy projectiles.
Oversized ballistic armor with ESAPI ceramic armor plates.
A pair of reinforced Kevlar tactical gloves, specifically designed to accomodate three fingered Killophants.  Thinner than regular oversized tactical gloves.
An all-encompassing massive black helmet that covers your entire face and neck, providing excellent protection from all sorts of damage.

A lightweight steel-reinforced tool carrier.  Keeps your tools safe and about in zero-g, Mars, the bottom of the Pacific, or other generally inhospitable environments.  It has several deep pockets, and two mounting points for pressurized canisters or other large magazines.
This jar contains a human brain kept alive by mi-go technology.  It has metal veined tendrils that appear to allow it to connect to various devices.
This heartlike organ has multiple valves and upon its proper removal from the bioweapons corpse each valve sealed itself.  It hums gently in your hands, as if waiting for an appropriate receptacle.

This lump of flesh has various lobes protruding from it that at intervals will emit toned sounds.  Perhaps it works via echolocation.  Like all mi-go bioparts the openings on this piece closed up after it was cut free and it seems to have gone into a form of hibernation with the pulses occurring slower and slower as it conserves energy.

This cross between a sea anemone and what you imagine a dragon's mouth would look like is the core body of the bioweapon.  You cannot imagine what you could make out of this but maybe someone somewhere does.
A broken mi-go turret.  It's leaking fluids and smells you can't identify.  Could be butchered for parts.

data.//: For sound messages
data.description: You ripped this from a mi-go abomination.  You think you should wear gloves to reload it.

The only copy of Housefly in existence - a long book about three individuals drawn together by fate in the early 1800s to save their English town of Victoria from a mysterious threat.  You never got to publish it, but reading it lets you forget the horrors of the Cataclysm, if only for a moment.

A pocket-sized book printed in 2000 by the United States Marine Corps for official use.  It describes the operation, repair, and cleaning of the Benilli M1014 shotgun.  Though specific to the M4, it can provide a wealth of information to the trained eye.

This hardcover book, aimed at the gun nut, provides an illustrated, concise history of the handgun throughout history, including technical specifications and use techniques.  It's difficult to follow without a passing knowledge in pistols, but an experienced handgun user could glean much from it.

name.str_pl: copies of Black Powder to Berettas

data.description: A history book penned by an anonymous author.  Starting from its design by John Garand and ending with the Vietnam War, it provides a detailed run-down of the M1 Garand rifle's use throughout history as well as its design and quirks with the weapon.

A detailed, full-colored guide to flamethrowers, incendiary weapons, and napalm.  It builds off of information provided in its sister book, Jane's Mortars and Rocket Launchers, and so it's mostly incomprehensible to anyone without prior knowledge.

name.str_pl: copies of Jane's Flamethrowers and Firestarters

data.description: A book detailing the workings of state of the art atomic technology, and the physics behind it.

name.str_pl: copies of Nuclear Physics Made Easy

data.description: Bearing the logo of Northrop, those are assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the chicken walker.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.

Bearing the logo of Northrop, those are assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the tank drone.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.

Bearing the logo of Honda, those are assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the tripod.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.
A folio of notes written by a madman.  They seem to suggestion ways to re-animate the dead and create various affronts to the natural order.

name.str: Cyrus Whateley's Notes on Repurposing mi-go victims

data.description: In what many considered a stunning example of poor taste and others considered overt specieism this text on the creation of Uplifted Animals references a story about sapient animals killing their creator.  Otherwise a dry text about genetic modification.

name.str_pl: copies of Dr Moreau and You

data.description: A pocket-sized book filled to the margins with cramped handwriting and notes on the biology of Mi-Go and other musings.  It's hard to understand and quite gruesome in some places and written in a shorthand or cipher in others.
A lab book dedicated to reverse engineering various ammunitions found throughout the solar system.  Written in a format to allow barely trained technicians to *safely* replicate these rounds.

name.str_pl: copies of Unusual Ammunitions of the Corporations

data.description: A generic techno doodad used to cast spells.
A small metallic sphere with a recessed bottom up top.  When activated it will allow you to swap positions with an existing hologram.
A small metallic sphere with a recessed bottom up top.  When activated it will allow you to select an hologram, which will explode in a blinding flash, stunning anything nearby.
A small metallic sphere with a recessed bottom up top.  When activated it will a holographic decoy in a location of your choosing.
A small metallic sphere with a recessed bottom up top.  When activated it will create several holographic decoys around you.
Installed on your body is a set of small retractable wind turbines.  When activated, they will deploy and slowly harvest wind power to recharge your power level.
A bomb installed where your spine meets your brain stem.  It's on a timer from installation and you don't have the codes to reset the timer.
Concealed in your head is a single shot .40 pistol.  Activate the bionic to fire and reload the skullgun.

A crumbly white pill half the size of your thumb, packed with vitamins and calories.  Provides a whole day's nutrition in portable form, but it's a little hard to keep down, thanks to the rancid taste and chalky texture.
data.name: nutriment

data.description: Nutriment that has been dissolved in water to dilute its taste.  Unnervingly resembles spoiled milk.
data.name: nutriment water

data.description: Water treated with some sort of chemical compound.  It's incapable of freezing, is very light, and glows faintly.  Drinking it seems to sharpen the senses.
data.name: sundew

data.description: Mixed with morphine, this sundew has congealed, and has an immense stimulative and pain-numbing effect.  With sufficient tools, it could be used to create anesthesia.
data.name: sungel

use_action.activation_message: Your vision sharpens and your eyes widen as the sungel slams your senses.

data.description: This sungel has been mixed with several drugs and yet inherits none of their effects.  Its painkilling effect hasn't changed, but its stimulative properties have been reversed, and it could be used as anesthesia for installation of bionics.
data.name: sunesthesia

use_action.activation_message: You go limp and collapse as the sunesthesia knocks you senseless.

data.description: A crumbly white pill half the size of your thumb, packed with vitamins and calories.  Provides a whole day's nutrition in portable form, but it's a little hard to keep down, thanks to the rancid taste and chalky texture.
data.name: nutriment

data.description: Nutriment that has been dissolved in water to dilute its taste.  Unnervingly resembles spoiled milk.
data.name: nutriment water

data.description: An golden can of sundew, the leading soft drink of the world.  Staring at the can, you feel a craving so intense that you are unsure whether its genuine, or if it has been carefully engineered and implanted into your mind.
data.name: sundew classic

data.description: When Thistle Industries successfully trademarked the chemical formula of water, you thought the world had gone irreparably insane, but things have only gotten worse since.
Smoothly blended edibles, neatly shaped into cubes for maximum enjoyment.
Foodplace™ easy-storage Food-to-go™ the choice Food™ for the contemporary Foodman™.
Rings of caramelized yellow colorant, tasting not exactly like apple.
Smooth crackers colored grayish-green.  Used to be perfectly edible seaweed, or so the wrapper claims.

Soy or pureed rat?  Better not to know.
(But its probably both.)
data.name: beefsim

data.description: Yellow chunks float on creamy liquid, like flotsam on a filthy summer pond.  Branding implies at least 26 other flavors, but you have neither seen or heard about any of them.
A dark and soapy beverage, pre-brewed and loaded with synthetic caffeine.
Mixed with morphine, this sundew has congealed, and has an immense stimulative and pain-numbing effect.  With sufficient tools, it could be used to create anesthesia.
data.name: sungel

use_action.activation_message: Your vision sharpens and your eyes widen as the sungel slams your senses.

data.description: The irreparably broken remains of a Sentinel-lx.  Could be gutted for valuable parts.
This bloodhound won't be chasing anyone anymore.  Could be gutted for parts.
A broken utility robot, now limp and unmoving.  Could be gutted for parts or crafted into a salvaged robot.
data.name: broken utility robot

data.description: A broken butler-bot, now silent and mangled.  Could be stripped down for parts.
data.name: broken butler-bot

data.description: A broken construction robot, now wrecked and immobile.  Could be stripped down for parts.
data.name: broken construction robot

data.description: A broken firefighter robot, now cold and inert.  Could be stripped down for parts.
data.name: broken firefighter robot

data.description: A broken rat snatcher, now harmless and inert.  Could be stripped down or re-crafted.
data.name: broken rat snatcher

data.description: A broken grabber robot, now limp and nonthreatening.  Could be stripped down or re-crafted.
data.name: broken grab-bot

data.description: A broken pest hunter, now harmless and inert.  Could be gutted for parts or re-crafted.
data.name: broken pest hunter

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated 5.56mm firearm.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military robot

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated 7.62x51mm firearm.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military robot

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated 8x40mm firearm.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military robot

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated flechette gun.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military robot

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated 40mm grenade launcher.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military robot

data.description: A broken military robot, shattered and inert.  This one is armed with an integrated flamethrower.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken military flame robot

data.description: A broken floating heater, now cold and motionless.  Could be stripped down or re-crafted.
data.name: broken floating heater

data.description: A broken defense robot.  Its internal weapons have been removed.  Could be gutted for parts or crafted into a salvaged robot.
data.name: broken defense bot

data.description: A broken advanced robot.  Its internal weapons have been removed.  Could be gutted for parts or crafted into a salvaged robot.
data.name: broken disarmed advanced bot

data.description: A broken advanced robot.  This one is armed with an integrated laser-emitter.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken advanced robot

data.description: A broken advanced robot.  This one is armed with an integrated plasma-ejector.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken advanced robot

data.description: A broken advanced robot.  This one is armed with an integrated laser-emitter.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken advanced robot

data.description: A broken advanced robot.  This one is armed with an integrated EMP projector.  Could be stripped for parts.
data.name: broken advanced robot

data.description: A broken defense robot.  Its internal weapons have been removed.  Could be gutted for parts or crafted into a salvaged robot.
data.name: broken disarmed military bot

data.description: A broken defense robot.  Its internal weapons have been removed.  Could be gutted for parts or crafted into a salvaged robot.
data.name: broken disarmed defense bot

data.description: A broken medical robot, now crumpled and inert.  Could be stripped down for parts.
data.name: broken medical bot

data.description: A small techno doodad.
A collection of the building blocks of polymers.  With this and a whole lot of know how you can create proteins and other building blocks of life.
For the mixing of biomaterials that might otherwise be antithetical to one another.
Lab grown or bioprinted muscle fibers, much denser and with higher performance ratios than baseline human muscles.
Materials capable of taking environmental chemicals and utilizing them for self repair, be careful you don't make grey goo.
Uncontaminated pure cellular matter than with the right instructions can become just about anything.
Small circuits blue and gold, transmitting signals through light.
A resplendent golden grid inlaid on dark blue substrate.
A monolithic circuit shaped as a glowing cube of crystal.
In your hands lies a self-contained digital universe.  Its programs glowing like stars fixed on computational shells infinitely layered.
It has given you an answer, but you are yet to ask anything.
An intricately spun and carefully engineered sheet of iridescent fibers.
A small battery component with a very high energy density.
A capacitor made from exotic compounds, capable of storing a high amount of electric charge.
Ultracapacitors assembled into a finely tunned energy storage array.
Superconductive wire warped upon itself manipulates the electromagnetic spectrum to store vast amounts of power.
A complex grid pins space-time to the surface of the multiversal hyper-torus, allowing the energies within to leak into our sliver of existence.
A sturdy, industrially crafted electromagnet.
A powerful super conductive electromagnet, that must be kept  at very low temperatures to operate.
A powerful electromagnet made from a room temperature superconductor.
Black metallic fluid, harmonically flowing from one fractal shape to the next.
Miscellaneous scrap pieces made from a composite alloy.
Malleable carbide cast by forges on high earth orbit.
A meta material fabricated by precisely layering different elements at an atomic scale.

Great forges within the Earth's core wrought hydrogen into flaming metal and poured it within lattices of super conductive lanthanum.  Locked in magnetic equilibrium, it was left to cool into a dark unbreakable metal
Matter condensed from the liminal spaces between dimmensions.
A thin strand of wire and a clamp, meant to be spliced into the smaller nerves of the human body.
A small array of metallic needles allows complex communication between machine and human mind.
A complexly etched rod of metal interfaces with the corpus callosum of the patient, granting increased control of bionic functions.
Photonic axons process thought at speeds far surpassing primitive, chemical-driven communication.
A membrane of artificial neurons envelops the cerebral cortex, melding machine and human intellect into a gestalt much greater than its individual parts.
This stitched together abomination in human form lies still and waiting for you to give it the spark of life.  In all likelihood you are the monster.
data.name: inactive frankenstein

data.description: This is an electronic weapon that will emit a short ranged electric field.  When activated, you'll have five turns before it starts doing so; throwing it before that would be a good idea.
data.name: electroshock grenade

data.description: This electroshock grenade is currently creating a dangerous electric field.
data.name: armed electroshock grenade

data.description: A slick, miniature derringer designed as a backup weapon for covert operations and close range assassination.  It will fire up to four 5x50mm penetrators simultaneously, to devastating effect.
This is a pseudo item for monster attacks.  If you see this, it's a bug.
data.name: base robogun

data.description: A 40mm grenade with an EMP charge.  It will release an electromagnetic pulse capable of damaging robots and some equipment.
This EMP grenade is active, and will shortly detonate, creating a large EMP field that damages robots and drains bionic energy.  You may not want to be holding it much longer.
data.name: active EMP grenade

data.description: A severed robotic hand from a Wraitheon Sentinel.  The powerful electro-laser stun gun embed on its wrist is still functional, and can be used when connected to an UPS.
A powerful tri-barreled laser weapon, still mounted to the robotic hand of the wraitheon drone it originally belonged too.  Can still be fired when connected to an UPS.
Bionic one-shot subdermal .40 pistol integrated with your head.

This is a horrifying monstrosity.  Using this item is cannibalism in all but taste and involves turning it on and placing it on the ground, where it will attach itself.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the turret will identify you as a friendly, and attack all enemies with its revolving laser cannons.

use_action.friendly_msg: The brain blaster swivels towards you.  Hi new friend!
use_action.hostile_msg: The brain blaster swivels towards you.  You feel a buzzing in the air.

data.description: This is an inactive chicken walker.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground, loading the unit with the factory-loaded 5.56 rounds and 40mm cartridge grenades in your inventory (if you wish to divide your ammunition, set aside whatever ammunition you do NOT want to give the robot) and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the chicken walker will then identify you as a friendly, roam around or follow you, and attack all enemies with a built-in firearm and grenade launcher.

use_action.//: Milspec, but was deployed in active service implying a reliable IFF
use_action.friendly_msg: The chicken walker rises to its feet, sways away from you and begins surveying the area.
use_action.hostile_msg: The chicken walker whirrs and aims directly at you.  Take cover!

data.//: cheating a bit with the volume due to lack of proper vehicle storage options
data.description: This is an inactive Beagle Mini-Tank UGV.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground, loading the unit with the factory-loaded 5.56 rounds and 40mm cartridge grenades in your inventory (if you wish to divide your ammunition, set aside whatever ammunition you do NOT want to give the robot) and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the tank drone will then identify you as a friendly, roam around or follow you, and attack all enemies with a built-in firearm and grenade launcher.

use_action.//: Milspec, clearly designed with little concern for collateral damage. What did you expect of a robo-tank?
use_action.friendly_msg: The tank drone rolls out and begins acquiring targets.
use_action.hostile_msg: The tank drone swivels its turret and aims directly at you.  Don your brown pants!

data.//: cheating a bit with the volume due to lack of proper vehicle storage options
data.description: This is an inactive chicken walker.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground, loading the unit with the factory-loaded 5.56 rounds and 40mm cartridge grenades in your inventory (if you wish to divide your ammunition, set aside whatever ammunition you do NOT want to give the robot) and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the tank drone will then identify you as a friendly, roam around or follow you, and attack all enemies with a built-in firearm and grenade launcher.

use_action.//: Milspec, clearly designed with little concern for collateral damage.  What did you expect of a chicken walker?
use_action.friendly_msg: The chicken bot rolls out and begins acquiring targets.
use_action.hostile_msg: The chicken bot swivels its turret and aims directly at you.  Don your brown pants!

data.description: This is an inactive Honda Regnal.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground, wondering how it fuels its flamethrower and turning it on.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the tribot will then identify you as an ally, roam around or follow you, and impale hostiles with its spiked cable weapons.

use_action.//: No observed open deployment, likely a prototype or secret project
use_action.friendly_msg: The tribot rises to its feet and scans the area for contaminants.
use_action.hostile_msg: The tribot glowers down at you and ignites its flamethrower.  Turns out you hate the smell of napalm.

data.description: A broken tribot.  Now that its legs lie broken and immobile, the world seems a little less threatening.  Could be gutted for parts.
A broken tank drone.  Still looks intimidating despite being permanently inoperative, possibly due to the sheer size and mass.  Could be gutted for parts.
A broken chicken walker.  Still looks intimidating despite being permanently inoperative, possibly due to the sheer size and mass.  Could be gutted for parts.

Crouched and dead still, this armored luxurious robot resembles an ancient knight immersed in deep prayer.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the robot will identify you as a friendly, and will protect you from nearby foes.
This is an inactive bloodhound drone.  If successfully deployed, it will fly towards enemy targets and highlight them with a powerful spotlight.

use_action.friendly_msg: The bloodhound drone flies from your hand and surveys the area!
use_action.hostile_msg: You misprogram the bloodhound drone; it's hostile!

data.description: This is an inactive laser turret.  Using this item involves turning it on and placing it on the ground, where it will attach itself.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the turret will identify you as a friendly, and attack all enemies with its replaceable laser cannons.  It requires ammunition tubes to fire.

A salvaged utility robot converted into an ambulatory bee hive that periodically removes and delivers segments of fresh honey comb.  It protects the insect colony with a mechanical crossbow mounted to its chassis.  Activate this item, with wooden bolts in your inventory, to load and deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive bee-bot

data.description: This is an inactive manhack.  Manhacks are fist-sized robots that fly through the air.  They are covered with whirring blades and attack by throwing themselves against their target.  Use this item to reprogram and activate the manhack.  Electronics and computer skill determines if the targeting matrix is reprogrammed successfully.
data.name: inactive hack

data.description: An inactive floating lantern, a fist-sized robots that flies through the air and illuminates its surroundings with bright LEDs.  The lantern is non aggressive and has no means of attack.  Activate this item to deploy the salvaged robot.
data.name: inactive floating lantern

use_action.friendly_msg: The floating lantern flies from your hand and lights up the area!

data.description: An unpowered military robot fitted with an integrated 7.62x51mm firearm and electric prod.  Activate this item, with ammo in your inventory, to load and deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive military robot

data.description: A salvaged eyebot repurposed into a floating space heater.  It emits a constant jet of warm air to heat an enclosed space.  It is non-aggressive and has no weapons systems.  Activate this item to deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive floating heater

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot repurposed for hunting small game.  It attacks targets with pincers and an integrated tazer.  Activate this item to deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive rat snatcher

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot repurposed to grab onto and immobilize enemies.  Activate this item to deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive grab-bot

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot refitted with an 8mm integrated firearm.  Activate this item, with ammo in your inventory, to load and deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive pest hunter

data.description: A salvaged eyebot repurposed into a floating space heater.  It emits a constant jet of warm air to heat an enclosed space.  It is non-aggressive and has no weapons systems.  Activate this item to deploy the robot.
data.name: inactive floating heater

data.description: This is an inactive laser turret.  Using this item involves turning it on and placing it on the ground, where it will attach itself.  If reprogrammed and rewired successfully the turret will identify you as a friendly, and attack all enemies with its revolving laser cannons.  It requires sunlight in order to fire.

data.//: The coins would be worthless but the PrepNet Phyle still retains some manufacturing capacity
data.description: PrepNet had been heavily involved in avoiding taxes by using untraceable internet currencies.  These however are physical coins with random numbers sequences embossed on them and RFID chips inside.
A wide, shallow basin used to hold liquid, hammered from a piece of sheet metal.  Ideal for collecting water.
A piece of light titanium, usable for crafting or repairs.

From the makers of the best-selling* FOODCO kitchen buddy comes the MetalMaster forge buddy, for all your metalworking, firing, and welding needs!  It's just as clunky and awkward as the thing it's spinning off, and still requires a vehicle battery to function.

Because it *clearly* needed one, this large all-in-one station provides the functions of FOODCO's kitchen buddy, now with complementary fume hoods and chemistry materials.  Why a chef would need a chemical rig is anyone's guess, but you can mount it on a vehicle to make use of it.
Skillet, pot, hotplate, and chemistry set; everything you need to cook food and chemicals.  Includes proper fume vents and a separator, so you don't contaminate your food with toxic chemicals.

data.//: Density 4.506g/cm³ ~ 1.127kg/250ml @ stack 1000 = 1g/unit
data.description: A strong, durable metal.  Highly valued for its weight to strength ratio, it was an excellent upgrade to aluminum for those properties albeit a lot more expensive due to rarity.  More commonly used in jewelery and medical implants.
An internal implant to correct a musculoskeletal problem such as a bad hip or back.  It is made of titanium due to its biocompatibility.
A dental implant made of pure titanium, used to replace teeth due to its bio-compatibility and durability.
A thick, masculine watch made out of titanium.  It is durable, light-weight and water-resistant, an excellent watch to have in a hostile environment.
A thick, masculine ring made out of titanium.  Made in a variety of styles and finishes, they're valued for their durability.
A super-concentrated mutagen strongly resembling a lava lamp.  You need a syringe to inject it… if you really want to?
data.name: mi-go serum

data.description: An extremely rare mutagen cocktail, it smells of sulphur and glows orange.
data.name: mi-go mutagen

data.description: A super-concentrated mutagen not for those frightened of this thing they have become.  You need a syringe to inject it… if you really want to?
An extremely rare mutagen cocktail, it seeks to cure what's deep inside.
A huge, empty space used in truck trailers to transport vast quantities of stuff.
A set of tiny electronics tools, including soldering irons and wire cutters.  They serve no purpose on their own, but are required for crafting bionics.
A huge metal space used in conjunction with extension of a vehicle's roof to create a very large amount of space for transporting goods.
Flour mixed with water, kneaded into a gooey paste.  This dough can be used to bake bread more efficiently than with just flour.
data.name: dough

data.description: Developed for the exploration of alien planes, the lightweight, orange-black HEV suit covers everything below the neck.  While it possesses only modest physical protection, it provides excellent protection from most environmental hazards.  A hatch in the front opens to provide a small amount of storage.
data.name: hazardous environment suit

data.description: Meant to pair with a compatible HEV suit, this helmet's physical protection is basic at best, but makes up for it with an air recycler that provides excellent protection from airborne contaminants.  It has a mounted LED headlamp, powered by standard batteries.
data.name: hazardous environment helmet

use_action.msg: You turn the helmet's headlamp on.

data.description: Meant to pair with a compatible HEV suit, this helmet's physical protection is basic at best, but makes up for it with an air recycler that provides excellent protection from airborne contaminants.  Its light is on, illuminating the area at a cost of batteries.

use_action.msg: The %s flicks off.

data.description: This is a makeshift quiver made from a thigh-high boot with the heel removed and patched shut, and strings used as a strap run through a hole punched into its side.  It can hold 40 arrows or bolts for easy access.
A piece of body armor from the Middle Ages consisting of boiled leather with riveted metal plates lying underneath.  Typically used to protect from arrows, it has very good protection against cuts.
A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  Titanium scraps have been inserted to improve its protection.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.

This sungel has been mixed with several drugs and yet inherits none of their effects.  Its painkilling effect hasn't changed, but its stimulative properties have been reversed, and it could be used as anesthesia for installation of bionics.
data.name: sunesthesia

use_action.activation_message: You go limp and collapse as the sunesthesia knocks you senseless.

data.description: Modeled after a proper brigandine from medieval times, this makeshift piece of body armor consists of layered cloth with small pieces of sheet metal affixed to the underside.  While not as protective as a proper piece of armor, it'll still keep you relatively safe.
data.name: crafted brigandine

data.description: A single-shot, break-action, electrically propelled, steel rail launcher handcrafted from scrap.  The hypervelocity metal stake that it fires is accelerated to the point of spontaneous combustion by a Lorentz force generated by electromagnetic induction, powered by a standard UPS.
A set of big pointy legs, like the ones found under a tripod.
What's left when you remove all moving parts and electronics.  It's the skeleton and armor of the tripod.
What's left when you remove all moving parts and electronics.  It's the skeleton and armor of the chicken walker.
What's left when you remove all moving parts and electronics.  It's the skeleton and armor of the Beagle tank.
Roots of a pineapple plant, for growing your own.
Some melon seeds.
Some banana saplings.
Some orange vine.  Definitely GMO.
Some lemon vines.  Definitely GMO.
Proof that man went too far before the Cataclysm.

A dark orange bodyglove, hundreds of tubes curl over its surface, tracing the contours of human musculature.  Meant to control body temperature during prolonged cryopreservation, it could easily keep you comfortable in any earthly climate.  Use it to activate its climate control functionality.

use_action.msg: You activate your %s.

data.description: The temperature control units of this high-tech garment are currently active, and continuously draining battery power.  Use it to turn them off.

use_action.msg: Your %s deactivates.

data.//: Delete this when you mainline Dairy products existing PR
data.name: churn

data.description: Your custom crafted atomic smartphone.  Most notably a confidential executive-level override program allows you to remotely control most robots.

use_action.msg: You activate the flashlight app.
You put in the earbuds and start listening to music.

use_action.//: 40 xp/hr.  Tier 1, 0-3 skill, higher-tier EXP since requires power.
use_action.training_msg: You fiddle with your phone’s settings and apps, picking up some basic computer knowledge.

data.description: This phone is playing music, steadily raising your morale.  You can't hear anything else while you're listening.

use_action.msg: You deactivate the flashlight app.

data.description: An adjustable chain wrench, designed for hard-to-reach places.  Being handmade, it lacks the precision of a proper wrench.
A huge, gas-powered saw with a diamond blade.  If it has gasoline, it can be turned on to turn it into a powerful metal cutting tool.

use_action.msg: You rev up the power cutter!

data.description: A huge, gas-powered saw with a diamond blade, currently a whirling blur.  It's consuming gasoline, but can be used a fantastic tool for cutting metal.  You can also use it as a terrifying weapon, if you're into that sort of thing.

use_action.msg: Your power cutter falls quiet.

data.description: This former power cutter has been lightened and stripped of all those unnecessary safety measures, turning it into a gas-powered killing machine.  Use it to turn it on.

use_action.msg: You rev up the murdersaw!

data.description: This fearsome weapon is currently whirring loudly and shaking with the force of its own power.  Use it to turn it off.

use_action.msg: Your murdersaw falls quiet.

data.description: A rope lighter made from simple materials.  Windproof and flameless, it consists of a length of rope run through a copper tube; a flint strike sparks embers in the rope that smolder and are used to ignite fires.  Specialized for outdoor use, it lasts for a very long time, but it's much slower to use than a normal lighter.

This is a unified power supply, or UPS.  It is a civilian evolution of a military project.  Designed to power advanced weapons and armor, the civilian version serves as a portable power bank and inverter for many household electronics.  It can be worn around to either leg for ease of access.

This is an advanced version of the unified power supply, or UPS.  This device has been significantly redesigned to provide better efficiency as well as to consume plutonium fuel cells rather than batteries, and is both slimmer and lighter to wear.  Sadly, its plutonium reactor can't be charged in UPS charging station.

A set of very small tools and encrypted digital keys normally used to repair bionic modules in clinical settings.  They will allow you to disassemble simple bionics, but anything more complex would require even more specialized tools.

A set of very small robotic tools and encrypted digital keys originally designed to disassemble and test the quality of industrially produced bionics.  A highly skilled and patient engineer could use them to manually assemble new cybernetics.

This device replaces standard power connections and battery ports for electronic devices with a carefully-shaped port that hooks into bionic implants.  When applied, it will convert an item to run directly off of bionic power.
data.name: cybernetic power port mod

data.description: A modified laptop, now capable of transmitting in the ultra-high frequencies utilized by robots.  Activate it to command robots from afar.

A heavy frame outfitted with tie-downs and attachment points for carrying cargo, with additional railings to keep a large machine in place.  It is meant to hold large drones and robots for transport.  Use it on a suitable robot to capture, use it on an empty tile to release.
data.name: robot carrier

data.description: A hefty black tube the size of your hand.  Activate to produce a hard-light blade, running off of UPS.

use_action.msg: You activate the energy saber, and its blade blazes into existence!
use_action.need_charges_msg: The energy saber is out of charge.

data.description: This glittering blue saber of cyan light hums gently, extending from its superalloy handle.  Its edge is lethally sharp, and being made of light, it's weightless, and immune to being damaged.  It's not white-hot like in pop culture, so it can't cut through anything, but there's not much in the way of flesh that it won't slice through easily.

use_action.msg: The blade dissipates into particles.

data.description: A sleek, stringless white metal longbow constructed of ultralight, atomic-age materials.  Rather than using ammunition, each shot uses high-tech projectors to create a string and arrow out of hard light on the spot, which provide excellent accuracy and armor penetration.  Being a bow, it's still not as powerful as conventional ballistic weapons.  It runs off of UPS power, and rather efficiently so.

A huge, heavy metal gauntlet lined with tubing and gauges.  Slow and unwieldy, it uses internal pressure to deliver devastating blows, but takes tremendous strength to use effectively.  Thanks to an internal microreactor, it doesn't require power of its own.

Typically used to flatten dough, this rolling pin has been repurposed as a weapon, with barbed wire adding some extra power and weight to its swing.  It has some real heft to it; perfect for the bakers of the apocalypse.
A grenade launcher mounted onto your right-hand wrist.  Less powerful than a proper grenade launcher, but infinitely more portable, and quick to reload.
The 120mm cannon from a tankbot.  If you have this, you'd best be debugging!
A luxury baseball bat made out of titanium that was banned from competitive sport due to the increased performance that put defenders at risk.
Designed to evade security measures, this knife is a must have for any Cataclysm dinner party.

This is an x-ray laser stripped a TX-5LR Cerberus laser turret that has been modified to use UPS power for firing.  Single shot then requires reloading.  Nicknamed the 'Tin Can Killer' for it's ability to destroy power armor.

data.//: Not something you get in bulk, but it makes sense to be out in the back area
Aftershock - vehicle testing
Aftershock - weapons testing

place_signs.signage: Whately Family Mortuary Services.  Serving New England for three hundred years.'

data.//2: This is a commercially built 4-bed LMOE shelter based on IRL plans.
data.//3: There are extensive secret rooms which might contain a lot of treasure in the non-looted version.

data.description: A lightweight wall made from unreinforced foamcrete.  Not nearly as resilient as a real wall, but it will block sight and the elements nonetheless.
data.name: foamcrete wall

data.description: A relatively flat slab of unreinforced foamcrete.
data.name: foamcrete floor

data.//: No flag even needed for this one, it's getting OVERSIZE now
Rare, location specific only
data.//2: 1-7 puppies & 300-320 days per-litter for size medium canines
data.description: A mix of Great Pyrenees and Ovcharka breeds outfitted with bionic enhancements.  These hounds defend Prep Phyle lands from all comers undead and otherwise.

petfood.feed: The %s seems to like you!  It lets you pat its head and seems friendly.
petfood.pet: The %s happily wags its tail while you pat their head.

data.description: An adorable, defenseless Cyber Mastiff puppy.  Much safer to tame than an adult dog.  CBMs are implanted but immature in growth with the puppy.

petfood.feed: The %s seems to like you!  It lets you pat its head and seems friendly.
petfood.pet: The %s happily wags its tail while you pat their head.

data.//: Mi-go base defenders for major boss battles.
data.name: GROUP_MI-GO_BASE_BOSS

data.//: Brute upgrades
data.name: GROUP_ZOMBIE_BRUTE

data.//: Hospital monster spawns.  Same as GROUP_ZOMBIE, but without Z-dogs.
data.name: GROUP_HOSPITAL

data.description: The mi-go have set up some defenses here.  This horrifying techo-organic amalgamation appears to use brains in jars as their operating system.  On the plus side it looks like it can be headshot.
The Whately family deploys mi-go style techno-organic defensive turrets.  They claim that these turrets are made from family members near death, but you have doubts.

The Northrop ATSV, a massive, heavily-armed and armored robot walking on a pair of reverse-jointed legs.  Armed with a 40mm anti-vehicle grenade launcher, 5.56 anti-personnel gun, and the ability to electrify itself against attackers, it is an effective automated sentry, though production was limited due to a legal dispute.

The Northrop Beagle is a refrigerator-sized urban warfare UGV.  Sporting an anti-tank missile launcher, 40mm grenade launcher, and numerous anti-infantry weapons, it's designed for high-risk urban fighting.

The Honda Crop King.  Originally designed for agriculture, it has a trio of spiked retractable cables and where it used to mount pesticide sprayer the PrepNet Phyle have modified it to have a flamethrower for their war against the Mycus.

Its exterior plates sable and gold, this luxurious variant of a Wraitheon drone was once kept as a bodyguard by society's wealthiest.  Still and with it's wrist sword extended, it resembles an ancient knight, standing an eternal watch.

A small spiked quadcopter robot equipped with a high-power spotlight.  This automated seeker drone was originally designed harry and harrass fugitives while maintaining visual contact for other pursuers.
One of the many models of utility robot formerly in use by government agencies, private corporations, and civilians alike.
data.name: utility robot

data.description: A utility robot designed for cleaning up waste material in hazardous conditions.
data.name: hazmat bot

data.description: A luxury model utility robot for domestic use.
data.name: butler-bot

data.description: One of the many models of construction robot formerly in use by government agencies and private corporations.  It is equipped with an integrated welder, flashlight, nailgun, and jackhammer.
data.name: construction robot

data.//: Monsters made out of steel and related materials get an additional resistance to being in flames in map::monster_in_field, but this fits thematically and makes it harder to melt with flamethrowers or lasers.
data.description: One of the many models of fire-fighting robot formerly in use by local fire departments and emergency services.  Designed for entering burning buildings and other situations deemed too dangerous for human firefighters.
data.name: firefighter robot

data.description: A free roaming medical robot capable of administering powerful anesthetics and performing complex surgical operations, usually in that order.  Faulty bio-diagnostic programs resulted in numerous lawsuits before the Cataclysm.
data.name: medical robot

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot repurposed for hunting small game.  It's faster than the original model but far less sturdy.
data.name: rat snatcher

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot repurposed to grab onto and immobilize enemies.  It's meant to work in a pack.
data.name: grab-bot

data.description: A salvaged skitterbot refitted with an 8mm integrated firearm.  The robot's small size precludes rapid fire, due to recoil, and requires the use of lightweight caseless ammo.
data.name: pest hunter

data.description: An automated riot control robot still active due to its internal power source.  This one is equipped with an electric prod and an integrated shotgun.
data.name: security robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 5.56mm firearm.
data.name: military robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 5.56mm firearm.
data.name: military robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 7.62x51mm firearm.
data.name: military robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 8mm firearm.
data.name: military robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 5x50mm flechette gun.
data.name: military robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 40mm grenade launcher.
data.name: grenadier robot

data.description: A military robot still operating due to its internal power core.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated flamethrower.
data.name: military flame robot

data.description: An advanced robot still functioning due to its internal fusion core.  This model is armed with a powerful laser-emitter.
data.name: advanced robot

data.description: An advanced robot still functioning due to its internal fusion core.  This model is furnished with a powerful laser-emitter.
data.name: laser-emitting robot

data.description: An advanced robot still functioning due to its internal fusion core.  This model is furnished with a powerful plasma-ejector.
data.name: plasma-ejecting robot

data.description: An advanced robot still functioning due to its internal fusion core.  This model is furnished with a powerful railgun.
data.name: railgun robot

data.description: An advanced robot still functioning due to its internal fusion core.  This model is furnished with a powerful EMP-projector.
data.name: EMP-projecting robot

data.description: An automated defense robot still active due to its internal power source.  This one is armed with an electric prod and an integrated 9mm firearm.
data.name: defense robot

data.description: A salvaged utility robot converted into an AI monitored bee hive that periodically removes and delivers honey combs.
data.name: bee bot

data.description: A salvaged drone repurposed into a mobile lightsource.
data.name: floating lantern

data.description: A salvaged eyebot repurposed into a floating space heater.  It emits a constant jet of warm air to heat an enclosed space.
data.name: floating heater

data.description: an intelligent animal created by man before the Cataclysm

The TX-5LR Cerberus is an upgrade to its predecessors.  It features a state of the x-ray laser cannon system with three barrels.  Each barrel will fire once and be exhausted until the part can be replaced.

Schwarz Walders were originally developed by a German company as forest rangers for the expanded Black Forest Conservation Area.  Shortly afterwards it was determined that they also made excellent long range reconnaissance units that could operate independently indefinitely.  Pre-Cataclysm they lived on every continent in a variety of jobs.
A young Schwarz Walder.  If one is out here, a very protective parent is likely nearby.

The Infeme are uplifted from apes and other near human ancestors.  The Zulu word for monkey became the catch-all term for many species of uplifts whether majority chimp, gorilla or baboon.  They've probably formed colonies hidden from the Cataclysm.

Despite lacking a head, this zombie appears to have not gotten the memo, and shambles aimlessly around without functioning senses.  Black ooze pulses out of its neck, and it stumbles around listlessly.

data.//: if you're this close, it can feel you there.
data.description: This headless zombie has swollen to frightening proportions, towering almost nine feet tall.  Six-foot-long feelers of black ooze blindly wave from its neck, violently twitching at nearby sounds, and it moves at terrifying speed with its grotesquely-swollen hands.
This towering zombie is covered in wounds and shedding fur.  Once it may have prevented forest fires in national parks, now it kills anything it catches.
Imagine a gorilla.  Now imagine it dead and rotting and somehow looking at you with more hate than you had previously imagined possible.
An undead Uplifted Elephant of ginormous size.  It still wears its assault grade armor.

data.//: We have our own headless zombies that were added first!
