info.description: Adds resurrection anchors.
info.name: Resurrection

data.description: A resurrection anchor, functioning as a spot for resurrection, the further away you are, the harder it is to bring everything back.
data.name: Resurrection anchor (deployed)

data.description: A resurrection anchor, can be placed to function as a point for revival.

name.str: Place and activate the resurrection anchor.

info.description: Adds an RPG [System] with [Classes], [Traits] and [Levels]. Gain experience from killing monsters, level up, choose a class, and gain powerful traits.
info.name: RPG System

data.description: A mysterious interface that allows you to access the [System]. It materialized in your possession when the System initialized.

data.apply_message: You feel a deep pain in your soul as you abandon your path.
desc: Your spirit has been damaged by abandoning your chosen path. You feel weakened and disconnected from your inner power.
name: Damaged Soul
data.remove_message: The spiritual damage heals.

data.description: Through rigorous training, you've honed your body. Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.55 STR, +0.2 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.15 PER
data.name: [Warrior]

data.description: Rage fuels your strikes. Your fury makes you strike 15% faster. Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.75 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.2 PER
data.name: [Berserker]

data.description: A living shield, protecting all. Your skin is naturally armored (+4 physical armor). Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.6 STR, +0.15 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.6 PER
data.name: [Guardian]

data.description: The arcane flows through you naturally. Vast reserves of mana (+1000 mana, +25% mana regen). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.05 DEX, +0.55 INT, +0.3 PER
data.name: [Mage]

data.description: You channel raw destructive power. Your hands glow with light (15). Immense reserves of mana (+2500 mana, +50% mana regen). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.2 DEX, +0.75 INT, +0.45 PER
data.name: [Mystic]

data.description: Knowledge flows to you effortlessly. You read with supernatural comprehension (+100% reading speed). Moderate mana reserves (+800 mana, +20% mana regen). Per level: +0.05 STR, +0.15 DEX, +0.8 INT, +0.5 PER
data.name: [Scholar]

data.description: Cunning and dexterous. A master of finesse and guile. Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.55 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.2 PER
data.name: [Rogue]

data.description: Master tracker and observer. Your senses are razor sharp. Your movements are unnaturally fast (5% faster movement, +1 speed per level). Per level: +0.15 STR, +0.3 DEX, +0.05 INT, +0.5 PER
data.name: [Scout]

data.description: A blur of graceful motion. Your reflexes are supernatural (+6 dodge bonus). Your movements flow with impossible speed (8% faster movement, +1.5 speed per level). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.8 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.4 PER
data.name: [Acrobat]

data.description: A shadow striking without warning. You move in complete silence (-40% noise, +30% hearing). You are nearly invisible (+50% stealth). Your movements blur with supernatural speed (8% faster movement, +1.5 speed per level). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.75 DEX, +0.35 INT, +0.3 PER
data.name: [Assassin]

data.description: Master sharpshooter with perfect aim. You see clearly in darkness (night vision 20 tiles). You require less water (half at level 10, none at 20). Your movements are unnaturally fast (5% faster movement, +1 speed per level). Per level: +0.15 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.8 PER
data.name: [Ranger]

data.description: Master of all trades. Your skilled hands work with incredible precision (+1 to all crafting skills, +40% crafting speed). Per level: +0.2 STR, +0.3 DEX, +0.4 INT, +0.6 PER
data.name: [Craftsman]

data.description: Your cells integrate seamlessly with cybernetics. Your body naturally generates bionic power (regenerates 2 kJ per level every 5 minutes).
data.name: [Bionic Symbiote]

data.description: Life energy flows through you. You are perpetually healthy and healing (increases health by 0.02 per level every 5 minutes).
data.name: [Vital Essence]

data.description: Your blood purifies toxins and radiation. You naturally cleanse radiation from your body (removes 0.5 radiation per level every 5 minutes).
data.name: [Purifying Blood]

data.description: Your skin is unnaturally resistant to environmental hazards. You naturally resist corrosive and thermal damage (+4 acid armor, +4 heat armor).
data.name: [Resistant Skin]

data.description: Your body is optimized for speed over strength. You move much faster but can't carry as much (25% faster movement, 25% less carry capacity).
data.name: [Lightweight Frame]

data.description: You carry burdens that would crush others. Your carrying capacity is significantly increased (+40% carry capacity).
data.name: [Strong Back]

data.description: Your stamina seems endless. You can exert yourself for much longer (+50% max stamina).
data.name: [Tireless]

data.description: Mana flows through you like a river. You possess increased magical power (+1250 mana, +25% mana regen, +12.5% mana multiplier).
data.name: [Mana Font]

data.description: You move with supernatural quickness. Your movements are a blur (25% faster movement).
data.name: [Blink Step]

data.description: Your body repairs itself rapidly. Your wounds close at an accelerated rate (+50% HP regen while awake, +100% HP regen while resting).
data.name: [Natural Healer]

data.description: Your body adapts to harsh conditions. You naturally resist extreme temperatures (-750, 750 bodytemp units).
data.name: [Adaptive Biology]

data.description: Immense power, fragile form. You move with tremendous speed (+20% speed) but are more vulnerable (-2 physical armor).
data.name: [Glass Cannon]

data.description: An unstoppable force. You are incredibly strong (+100% carry capacity, +8 physical armor) but move very slowly (30% slower movement, 15% slower speed).
data.name: [Juggernaut]

data.description: You store immense magical energy. Your mana reserves are enormous (+5000 mana) but regenerate very slowly (50% slower mana regen).
data.name: [Arcane Battery]

data.description: Your fists are hardened weapons. Your unarmed strikes deal devastating damage (+6 bash, +4 cut, +3 pierce damage).
data.name: [Iron Fists]

data.description: Your body uses resources efficiently. You need 40% less food and get tired 30% slower.
data.name: [Efficient Metabolism]

data.description: You react instantly to threats. Your reflexes grant superior evasion (+3 dodge bonus).
data.name: [Combat Reflexes]

data.description: You land gracefully from any height. You take 95% less falling damage and gain +2 dodge bonus.
data.name: [Acrobat]

data.description: You never seem to tire. You get tired 50% slower and recover from fatigue 80% faster.
data.name: [Tireless Worker]

data.description: Your body processes energy rapidly. You regenerate stamina 100% faster but need 40% more food.
data.name: [Rapid Metabolism]

data.description: You emit almost no scent. Enemies that track by smell have much harder time detecting you (90% reduced scent).
data.name: [Scentless]

data.description: Your blood clots almost instantly. You are highly resistant to bleeding (1000 bleed resistance).
data.name: [Clotting Factor]

data.description: Your limbs mend at an incredible rate. Broken and damaged limbs heal 100% faster.
data.name: [Regenerator]

data.description: Your hands are skilled at creation. You craft 20% faster and build 20% faster.
data.name: [Master Craftsman]

data.description: You know how to pack efficiently. Your worn containers hold 50% more items.
data.name: [Pack Rat]

data.description: You instinctively know how to harvest creatures. You can efficiently harvest materials with your bare hands (butchering quality 40).
data.name: [Creature Harvester]

data.description: You drain life essence from your foes. Heal for 0.5% of monster's max HP per level (minimum 1 HP) on kill.
data.name: [Vampiric]

info.description: Higher dex increases your speed.
info.name: SpeedyDex

info.description: You gain XP from kills that you can spend on increasing your stats.
info.name: Stats Through Kills

info.description: Adding e-book system on tablet PC
info.name: Tablet e-book

info.description: Add craftable and buildable teleporters.
info.name: Teleportation

data.description: A teleporter anchor, functioning as a target you can teleport to.
data.name: Teleporter anchor (deployed)

data.description: A teleporter station, can be used to teleport.
data.name: Teleporter station (deployed)

data.description: A device with a digital display, connected to the teleporter network.  Can be used to check teleporter status and teleport the user.
A teleporter anchor, can be placed to function as a target.
A deployable teleporter station.

A disjointed collection of lab book pages, post-it notes, and computer printouts containing some funky physics equations and circuit diagrams.  They seem to be describing some form of stable teleportation technology.

name.str: Place and activate the teleporter anchor.
Place and activate the teleporter station.

info.description: New default tileset for BN. Work in progress, uses UDP as a base.
info.name: UDP Redux

info.description:
Additional weathers ported from the Japanese CDDA variant and modified to fit BN.

Enables acid rain and adds the following weather: Rainbows, Sundogs (renamed from Diamond Dust), Northern Lights, Geomagnetic Storms, Acid Flurries, Acid Snow, and Acid Snowstorms.
info.name: Weather Variants
